item.title: Eclipse Party w/ Saucy Brew Works & Cartridge Brewing
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: We are once again teaming up with our good friends at Saucy Brew Works & Cartridge Brewing!! This time will be a once in a lifetime event for the total solar eclipse! With Bellefontaine being located right in the line of totality we have decided that will be holding an all day tap takeover and outdoor DORA booth featuring a once in a lifetime beer!! Just for this occasion, Saucy has cooked up "Bright Eyes", a 9% Imperial West Coast IPA with Citra Simcoe Columbus and Columbus Cryo! Tons of prizes and swag will be available. Let's party in the dark!!

item.title: Macrame Plant Hanger Workshop at Eden Haus
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a cozy plant hanger workshop, where we'll embrace the lingering winter vibes and channel the anticipation of spring in Ohio. Create beautiful hangers to showcase your favorite plants, bringing a touch of greenery into your home as we transition towards warmer days. This is a beginner friendly macramé class where you will learn some basic knots and how to put them together to create something special for your home.

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Sunday, February 25th from 2-4 PM. This event will be held at Eden Haus in Bellefontaine, Ohio. All materials will be provided.

Tickets:
- $35 per guest and you get to take home your finished plant hanger.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via the refund option on Eventbrite or email triplemoonproducts@gmail.com and be refunded.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- No children under the age of 10 please.

The Venue:
Our workshop will be indoors at Eden Haus at 118 W Chillicothe Ave in Bellefontaine.

item.title: Solar Eclipse Watch Party at Roundhouse Depot
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a weekend of New Beer Releases especially made for the ecplise. Food Truck line up
April 6th Saturday 3-8
Guelaguetza Mexican Street Food Truck
April 7th Sunday 12-4
Flappers Fins and Fries
We will have Solar Eclipse viewing glasses available limited quantities

item.title: First Annual Ravensburger Puzzle Competition
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for our first annual puzzle competition!

Teams of up to 4 people will have two hours to complete a 500 piece Ravensburger puzzle. The three fastest times will win prizes!

First place: $200

Second place: $100

Third place: $50

We will also be awarding prizes for best dressed, so bring some pizazz!

Our event will be held in the Tanger's Furniture dining room gallery. Registration begins at 12:30pm and tables will be selected on a first come, first served basis the day of the event.

Our competition begins promptly at 1pm with the buzzer sounding at 3pm.

Questions? Please call 937-599-2993.

Thank you to Ravensburger for their generous support of this event!

Space is extremely limited, so don't delay and register your team now at btownfun.com/puzzle

item.title: TayTay Partay, hosted by Ellie B
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Don't miss your chance to dance the night away at our Taylor Swift party, hosted by Ellie B! We're making crafts, eating Taylor-inspired food, snapping selfies & shaking it off at The Fun Company!

There will be prizes for best dressed - so don't forget to pick your era and dress the part!

Your $13 ticket includes food, drinks, craft supplies, and other goodies. Space is extremely limited - get your tickets today: btownfun.com/swiftie

item.title: HoneyCore's Solve the Mystery Party
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Do you love murder mystery?! We sure do! If you do, this is the event for you too!

Grab your best crime loving girlfriends & join us. We will have several teams competing to solve the mystery and see who can do so the quickest!

item.title: Easter Egg-Stravaganza
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
This year’s Easter Eggstravaganza presented by Prescription Bliss will be fun and exciting for all ages!

Free activities will be happening all over town! A little arts and crafts, scavenger hunt around town, movie at the Holland, and much more! This year we have a few extra add-ons, but kept a lot of the favorites from past year's events!

You can add some extra fun with the purchase of a passport! Presale passports can be found on Eventbrite for $10.00. The passport includes a sling bag stuffed with surprises, a pass for slime egg coloring at The Fun Company, an art activity at Prescription Bliss, cookie decorating with City Sweets & Creamery in the Main St Marketplace, and a glow Easter Egg Hunt at Putt and Play!

Wait, we hinted about some add-ons! Community Health and Wellness is celebrating 10 years and will have FREE activities and opportunities to win prizes for kids and adults!

And we didn’t forget pictures with the Easter Bunny!!! The Photo Booth will be scheduling photos with the Easter Bunny! Tickets for pictures will be $20 when purchased online or $25 at the door. Purchase & schedule with The Photo Booth usinadd-ons the link below. https://photoboothbooking.as.me/bunnyphotos

The event will start in Downtown Bellefontaine at 4:00 PM, grab the family and head over to The Chamber office to pick up your passport and ticketed purchase.

item.title: B2wins
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Fun-loving twin brothers present "Top 40 From the Last 40": four decades of the music you know and love with a unique twist. This unforgettable, engaging show is for all ages and features one-of-a-kind renditions of everything from Sinatra to Ed Sheeran, Louis Armstrong to Dua Lipa, Michael Jackson to Daft Punk. Get ready to sing, dance, laugh and take your soul on a feel-good ride through the chart-topping hits of American music.

item.title: Lunasa
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
The best Irish band in the world returns to the Holland! From the start, Lúnasa’s complex arrangements and unique sound reshaped the boundaries of traditional music and energized audiences the world over. Critical acclaim followed, with The Irish Echo describing Lúnasa as the “the hottest Irish acoustic band on the planet”; Billboard raved that “anybody who listens can’t help but find them contagious.”

Generously sponsored by Marker, Inc.

Season Sponsors: Beasley Architecture & Design and Marker, Inc.; Media Sponsors: Bellefontaine Examiner and V-Teck Communications; Season Support: Honda of America and Ohio Arts Council

item.title: Leslie Mendelson
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: A Brooklyn-based singer/songwriter described by Relix Magazine as an artist with “a loyal, cross-generational audience that hugs the hippie, hipster, coffee shop and society crowds,” Leslie’s timeless musicality and evocative songwriting indeed cuts a wide swath. All Music writes that Leslie evokes “1970s songwriter influences in the vein of Carole King and Carly Simon,” while The Aquarian declares she is “the closest thing one can get to a truly honest musical experience.”

item.title: Magic of Kevin Spencer - Sensory Inclusive
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Kevin Spencer uses the art of magic to change lives. He provides access to the arts for individuals of all ages and abilities, offering extraordinary methods for reaching those deemed “unreachable.” His specialized programs are tailored to children and adolescents with developmental and intellectual disabilities, marginalized senior adults, and veterans dealing with PTSD and difficulties with social reintegration.

item.title: Chris Funk - Redefining Wonder
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Chris Funk’s REDEFINING WONDER is a perfect way to celebrate the total eclipse – an experience that will have audiences talking and scratching their heads for years to come! This multimedia magic show with live music has met rave reviews on shows including NBC's America's Got Talent and performances from Planet Hollywood to Rio.

Experience for yourself the performer Simon Cowell raved about – “BEST MAGICIAN we’ve had on the show so far! I’ve NEVER seen anything like that!” – and Disney describes as “Absolutely FANTASTIC!”

Generously sponsored by Beasley Architecture & Design

Season Sponsors: Beasley Architecture & Design and Marker, Inc.; Media Sponsors: Bellefontaine Examiner and V-Teck Communications; Season Support: Honda of America and Ohio Arts Council

item.title: Raul Midon
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Singer, songwriter, guitarist and engineer, Raul Midón established himself as a first-call session singer upon graduation from the prestigious Studio Jazz program at the University of Miami in 1991. Midon and his twin brother Marco were blind as infants after spending time in an incubator without adequate eye protection. The sound of music became integral to Midón's life at age four when his father introduced him to the drum, and today the Grammy-nominated artist has achieved worldwide acclaim.

Generously sponsored by Ravenhurst Champagne Cellars

Season Sponsors: Beasley Architecture & Design and Marker, Inc.; Media Sponsors: Bellefontaine Examiner and V-Teck Communications; Season Support: Honda of America and Ohio Arts Council

item.title: Windmill Productions: My Fair Lady
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
This classic musical tells the story of Eliza Doolittle, a Cockney flower girl who takes speech lessons from professor Henry Higgins, a phonetician, so that she may pass as a lady. Despite his cynical nature and difficulty understanding women, Higgins grows attached to her. From "Wouldn't It Be Loverly" to "I Could Have Danced All Night," the show's songs have become much-loved standards.

Performances are at 7:30 p.m. Friday, June 14; 7:30 p.m. Saturday, June 15; and 2 p.m. Sunday, June 16.

item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Paint a pot and then let’s plant a beautiful plant in it!

item.title: Downtown Bellefontaine Spring Shop Hop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: The final leg of spring break week and the perfect time to catch up on your spring shopping before the big eclipse weekend hits. Local residents will have a big weekend to look forward to downtown with events everyday, so we are kicking off the weekend with a little shop hop to get you going. Local retailers will hosts specials at their locations to top off those spring wardrobe must haves!

item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: All the way from Mars, the Intergalactic Wrestling Federation's reigning tag team champions, Goonsome Twosome scour the galaxy looking for challengers, good times whilst playing American style junk band music.

item.title: Bunny Brunch at The Fun Company
item.dc:creator: admin_sn

We're serving up a delicious Easter-themed brunch, and a special guest will be making an appearance - the Easter Bunny herself! Space is extremely limited - nab your spot today at btownfun.com/bunnybrunch. Tickets are $10 each and include breakfast, an activity, and meeting the bunny!

item.dc:creator: admin_sn

item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Come get lucky at Brew!!! Ice cold green pints of Duke's Leprechaun Light, Lucky Charms shots, St. Paddy's themed cocktails, and corned beef hash all weekend with a bar crawl on Saturday! Let's sham-rock-n-roll !!

ALL STYLES AND EXPERIENCE LEVELS WELCOME!

item.content:encoded:
catcher! Dive into a kaleidoscope of colors, tunes, and creativity as you learn the art of stained glass and fashion your own dazzling, groovy masterpiece.

item.title: FRIENDS Trivia
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us at Brewfontaine for FRIENDS Trivia!

Gather your lobster and join us for a nostalgic trip down memory lane at our 'Friends' Trivia Night! Grab your Central Perk crew, showcase your knowledge of Ross's divorces, Joey's pick-up lines, and all the unforgettable moments.

Prizes include glassware, shirts, and gift cards.

No need to come with a team (or do), you can sign up when you get here to have a good time.

For future events, visit our Facebook events page.
Admission is free for this event

item.title: Bloom & Brush: A Flower Bouquet Painting Event
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Indulge your creativity in a blooming paradise at our "Bloom & Brush" event! Join us for an enchanting afternoon of painting beautiful flower bouquets. Let your imagination flourish as you capture the essence of blooming flowers, vibrant petals, and lush greenery on canvas.

 **Guided Painting Session** 

No prior painting experience? No problem! Our talented instructor will guide you step-by-step through the process, ensuring that your masterpiece blossoms into life with each brushstroke.

 **Inspiring Atmosphere** 

Relax in our new creative lounge adorned with fresh flowers and soothing music, providing the perfect ambiance for artistic inspiration to bloom. Our bouquets are locally grown by T. Time flowers! 

 **Giveaways & Discounts** 

We will be doing a drawing during the event to give away all of the bouquets brought in by T. Time flowers . Enjoy 10% off your shopping experience as well!

 **Refreshments & Socializing** 

Pick up and sip on adult refreshments at any one of our local DORA neighbors, as you mingle with fellow participants and exchange creative ideas.

 **Take Home Your Masterpiece** 

At the end of the event, take pride in your artwork and bring home your vibrant flower bouquet painting to adorn your living space with the beauty of blooming blooms.

 Save the Date:
Saturday, April 20th from 2:00pm to 4:00pm
Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 W Columbus Ave, Bellefontaine, OH 43311
(Street parking in front, parking lot in back)

Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to visit! We have tons of great restauranta, coffee shops, boutiques, bakeries, and more! If you're coming in from out of town please spend the whole day with us and explore the town!

item.title: Stained Glass Workshop at Triple Moon
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Step into our whimsical stained glass workshop, where beams of creativity shine as brightly as the sun itself. With each delicate shard of glass, we weave together a radiant tapestry, capturing the warmth and joy of a sun-kissed day. Join us and let your imagination soar as we craft luminous sunshine designs that dance with color and light.

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Sunday, April 21st from 2:00pm to 5:00 pm. Grab a friend and reserve your spots, there are only 16 spots available and our last workshop sold out quickly! This is a beginner friendly piece and all materials & equipment will be provided.

Tickets:
- $65 per guest and you get to take home your finished stained glass piece.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via the refund option on Eventbrite or email triplemoonproducts@gmail.com and be refunded.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- No children under the age of 13 please.
- Our class will only be canceled under a level 3 snow emergency. In the event of a winter storm, our workshop will be rescheduled and ticket amount will not be refunded. Please keep this in mind when purchasing your ticket.

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City: Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places we have to offer! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and food! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

Follow Triple Moon on Eventbrite for reminders of our upcoming events!

item.title: Logan County Music and Art Festival Concert
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
High school students from Bellefontaine, Benjamin Logan, Calvary Christian, Indian Lake, and Riverside Schools present this all-county honors band concert! A free ticket is required for admission.

This event is sponsored by the Holland Theatre and LoCo Art; donations will be accepted to support future youth arts programming. Artwork from K-12 students will also be on display and may be viewed before the concert beginning at 5 p.m. Art may also be viewed from 1 to 3 p.m. on Saturday, April 13, and Sunday, April 14.

item.title: Columbus Jazz Quintent
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Columbus Jazz Quintet brings the exciting sounds of classic and modern jazz to Bellefontaine!

This collection of talented Central Ohio musicians includes Sydney McSweeney’s return on vocals, local graduate Isaac Bednarki on percussion, longtime favorite Bobby Floyd on piano, Miles Smith on trumpet and George DeLancey on bass.

The group performs all styles of jazz including bebop, blues, Latin, ballads, and more.

item.title: Scriptless in Seattle - Comedy Show
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Scriptless in Seattle is a one-of-a-kind, interactive comedy show in which there is NO SCRIPT! The group’s hilarious sketches, improvised musicals, game shows, film noir, and more are created on the fly based entirely on the direction that you decide. No two shows are ever the same, ensuring an evening filled with surprises, laughter, and memorable moments.

This show is family friendly and appropriate for all ages.

item.title: Brio Play Day!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Grab your little train lover and join us for a play day of EPIC proportions! Hundreds of dollars of Brio trains and tracks will be set up for you to play with all day at our store. Let your imagination run wild as you build the railway of your dreams! It's free!

item.title: Family Paint Night - Featuring Sloth
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Relax and take it easy at our family paint event featuring our adorable sloth 🦥🎨 canvases! Join us for a laid-back evening of painting, where you can unwind, let your creativity soar, and embrace the slothful pace of life. It's a chance to slow down, enjoy the moment, and create unforgettable memories with your loved ones. The Details: This workshop is open to anyone interested in painting a sloth! Your canvas, paint and brushes will be provided, all you have to do is show up and relax! Bring the whole family or come solo, you’re welcome here always! If you can’t make it right at 5:30, that is OK, just let me know ahead of time. If you can’t make it on this date but you would like to schedule your own family paint session please email triplemoonproducts@gmail.com. Tickets: - $15 per person. We provide all materials and clean up the mess! - All ages welcome. - No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via the refund option on Eventbrite or email triplemoonproducts@gmail.com and be refunded. - If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials. - No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded. The Venue: The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge 117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

item.content:encoded: Darcy is a local independent recording artist that brings back the heart and soul of acoustic rock. Drawing from her bluegrass roots, this singer songwriter brings original music as well as all of your favorites from the 90s to now! No band, just Darcy.

item.title: B-Town Brewfest - First Fridays Bellefontaine
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Get ready to raise your glasses at the 5th annual B-Town Brew Fest, proudly presented by Royer Realty and Alan Galvez Insurance! This year, we're taking the party to Saturday for an epic celebration! Each ticket holder will be treated to 10 tasting tickets, a stylish slap koozie to keep your brews cold, awesome swag from various businesses, and exclusive access to the after-party at The Syndicate! And that's not all – your first beer at the after-party is on us! Enjoy the electrifying performance by the dueling pianos as you unwind and make unforgettable memories with friends! Don't miss out on this favorite event of the year!

item.title: Modern Calligraphy Workshop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Learn the finer points of calligraphy, but with a modern twist! No experience needed. Supplies included. Charcuterie and drinks included!
You’ll receive the best tools and learn how to use them with basic practice strokes and a full beginner alphabet.
Plus, each guest takes home a Tombow brush pen and canvas tote! Grab your friends (or come hang solo!) for this Poppie Studios workshop - there’s a seat with your name on it!

item.title: Stained Glass Workshop at Triple Moon
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Embark on a creative journey at Triple Moon Creative Lounge!  Delve into the intricate art of stained glass as Windyknolls guides you through crafting a captivating teardrop-shaped flower.  With meticulous attention to design, you'll have the opportunity to customize the colors of your petals, creating a truly unique masterpiece. Immerse yourself in our serene atmosphere and let your imagination flourish. Reserve your spot now for a workshop that promises to inspire and enchant!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Saturday, May 18th from 2:00PM to 5:00PM. Our guest instructor for this event is Stacey from Windyknolls Stained Glass. All materials will be provided.

Tickets:
- $65 per guest and you get to take home your finished project.
-Customize your project by choosing your flower color for the design.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via Windyknolls Stained Glass.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- No children under the age of 12 please.

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Beer Pong at Triple Moon
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Join us at Triple Moon on May 4th from 6-9 during the downtown Brewfest event for some beer pong fun! Stop by to play a game or simply hang out with friends. We're keeping it classy with water in the cups, so come and enjoy like civilized adults. Remember, we're not an official Brewfest stop, so BYOB and join us in the DORA zone for a good time!

item.title: Chrome Horse: The Bob Dylan Tribute
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Join us for a special Wednesday dinner service from 6:00 PM-9:00 PM Showcasing Drew Gabbert, Texas-based veteran musician, has set the table and is serving up an authentic Dylan experience with a repertoire that spans six decades of material. There is no cover charge to enter the show. If the weather permits we will be hosting this show in our beer garden on our Syndicate stage. Our full dinner and cocktail menu will be available. Please contact 937-210-5165 for special seating accommodations.

item.title: Kay Gee Live
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Singer/songwriter Kristin Gilley originally a Bellefontaine native is making her way back north for the second gig of her 2024 summer “Renew” tour .
KG describes her playing style as “Transformational Acoustic” . Music written with the power of intention .
“Life has a way of turning our hearts inside out. We have two choices , to keep it all bottled up inside or create something meaningful. I choose to share my story of life lessons through song!” -KG

item.title: Open Mic Night w/ Host John Whitehead
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
OPEN MIC NIGHT WITH HOST JOHN WHITEHEAD!
COME SHARE YOUR TALENT!
ALL STYLES AND EXPERIENCE LEVELS WELCOME!
We will provide 2 microphones, a 4 channel board and a PA. Keep in mind we have limited space but the more the merrier! Space not available for full drum sets.
Secure your time slot here: https://brewfontaine.com/open-mic.html
Please note: Preferred time slots are not guaranteed. Please show up early and be flexible with scheduling.

item.title: Dine To Donate Representing The Mike Bible Scholarship Fund
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
The Mike Bible Scholarship Fund raises money for a scholarship that will be awarded to a Bellefontaine Graduate who is attending a 4 year college or university and furthering their athletic career.

Brewfontaine will be donating 10% of our sales for the entire day. Dine in and Carry out.

item.title: Pineapple Palooza
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready for the event of the year: Pineapple Palooza! 
Proudly Sponsored by Four Acre Clothings family of companies!

Join us in Downtown Bellefontaine  Saturday, June 7, from 2 PM to midnight.
This signature event is centered around our beloved downtown fountain, topped with a pineapple, symbolizing hospitality, welcome and a real good time 

This year, Pineapple Palooza is bigger and better than ever:
-  Dance to beats from our live DJ.
-  Fly down Main Street on a thrilling zipline.
-  Enjoy a variety of food trucks.
-  Catch live performances and a CONCERT on the main stage to cap off the night.
-  Partake in pineapple-themed contests and win prizes!
-  Get a custom t-shirt printed live on-site.

With attractions and activities galore, this is your perfect chance to dive into all things fun and pineapple. Stay tuned for more details, and don't forget to grab a friend for a fantastic time at Pineapple Palooza!

#PineapplePalooza #Festival #DowntownBellefontaine #FunInTheFountain #LiveMusic #FoodTrucks #ZiplineAdventure #PineappleFun

item.title: The Murph Challenge
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us on Memoria Day, May 27th for The Murph Challenge, at The Loco Depot in Bellefontaine. The first heat kicks off at 7:00 am, with subsequent heats on the hour until the last heat takes off at noon, accommodating all schedules.

Whether you're a seasoned athlete or just starting your fitness journey, modifications are welcomed for everyone to participate. The Murph Challenge is not just a physical test, but also a mental and emotional one. Participants are pushed to their limits and are encouraged to keep pushing through the pain and exhaustion, just as Lieutenant Murphy did during his final moments. The event is held annually on Memorial Day, and people from all over the world come together to honor Lieutenant Murphy and all those who have given their lives in service to our country. The Murph Challenge is a powerful reminder of the sacrifices made by our military and a testament to the strength and resilience of the human spirit.

Let's come together to sweat, support, and salute our heroes. See you there!

If you are interested in some Murph Swag, check out the link below. Orders must be received by 4/30.

item.title: WCOC Concert Band Summer '24 FREE Show
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join the West Central Ohio Community Concert Band for a perfect summer afternoon of music!

Directed by Mr. Myles Bowers, the all-volunteer band includes amateur and professional musicians, educators, and students hailing from multiple Ohio counties. Admission is free, but a ticket is required to make sure everyone has a seat at this popular annual concert.

More details about the program will be available soon!

item.title: Turn to Stone | A Tribute to ELO
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
America's authentic '70s Electric Light Orchestra tribute band bring the early years of ELO back to life!

Turn To Stone captures the essence of a live retro performance with the high quality production and orchestration standards of today. The band tours with the same instrumentation as 1970’s ELO, with a guitarist, keyboardist, bassist, drummer, violinist, and two cellists.

A coordinated lightshow, authentic costumes, and a live string section help deliver an unforgettable performance!

item.title: The Jungle Book KIDS
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
TICKET ON SALE EARLY JUNE. Local grade school children take the stage for this kids' musical version of Disney's The Jungle Book. Come enjoy the classic story of Mowgli and friends and support these budding thespians as they showcase the results of their hard work!

The show will last about 45 minutes.

Performances are 7 p.m. Friday, July 12, and 2 p.m. Saturday, July 13.

item.title: Parrots of the Caribbean | Salute to Jimmy Buffett
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate Fourth of July with the number one Jimmy Buffett tribute in the country! Parrots of the Caribbean plays Buffett & Friends’ biggest hits plus their original Cajun, country-rock tunes.

You’ll be drawn into the full concert experience as the stage comes alive with the wonderfully wild and crazy, famous and sometimes outrageous antics of the Parrots of the Caribbean!

item.title: The Very Hungry Caterpillar Brunch
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us as we celebrate the 55th anniversary of The Very Hungry Caterpillar with a FUN themed brunch at The Fun Company!

There will be delicious food, activities, and lots of cool books to read! Tickets are $10 each. Anyone who wishes to sit in our brunch area will need a ticket, and a very filling breakfast will be included - so don't be shy, this food is for grownups, too!

Please note that tickets are being sold every hour on the hour, so please make note of the time on your ticket. Our seating area is limited so we're spreading out the deliciousness 

We cant wait to see you!

item.title: Book Club: "What Happened To You?"
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for book club! We are gathering together at The Fun Company in Downtown Bellefontaine for a free discussion of "What Happened To You?" by Bruce D. Perry, M.D, Ph. D., and Oprah Winfrey.

Coffee and light snacks will be provided.

This event is co-sponsored by our friends at Eden Haus.

If you would like to purchase the hardcover edition of "What Happened To You?" at a discount, please do so at btownfun.com/bookclub

item.title: Father's Day Gift Making Event at the Fun Company
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us as we make something RAD for DAD this Father's Day! You'll be designing and painting your very own wooden valet tray for your old man! Use your handprints, finger prints, or doodle something awesome!

We'll also be making cards and eating snacks! Space is limited - book your ticket today: btownfun.com/dad

item.title: Babywearing 101 with MacKenzie
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Are you a new parent or parent-to-be that wants to learn more about babywearing? Do you already own a carrier but aren't sure if you're using it correctly? Are you in the market for a carrier but not sure which one will work best for you and your child? Come to The Fun Company on Sunday, June 9th, and MacKenzie Fitzpatrick will answer all of these questions and then some!

We will have all types of carriers available for you to try, or you can bring your own and have a fit check! MacKenzie is a Certified Birth Doula who also has a degree in Early Childhood Education (among tons of other certifications!) And she's the Lead Co-Educator at Journey Nature School, which means she has worn her son to work nearly every day of his life. We have no doubt that there's no one better to lead us on this babywearing adventure.

While future workshops may have an associated fee to attend, our first one is being offered to you totally free of charge! Tag a parent or pregnant person in the comments and make plans to join us

item.title: Toddler Water Play Party
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a toddler water play party at The Fun Company! We will have our play area set up with large bins of water and our favorite bath toys for your little one to discover! This event is FREE and recommended for kids aged 12 months to 3 years old (but we won't be checking IDs ;))

We recommend that you dress your child in clothes that can get wet (they will *NOT* be submersed in water but it might get splashy). Bring a bath towel to dry off when you're done!

Our water play area will be set up until 10am and depending on interest may repeat monthly! Join us, won't you?

item.title: Official Savage Race After Party
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
READY TO CREATE A LIFELONG MEMORY?
It’s more than just a race. It’s about setting personal goals and smashing them. It’s about pushing your limits to defeat the world’s best obstacles. It’s about teamwork and friendship. It’s about the amazing people you will meet on the course. It’s about the mud, the fire, and the Facebook pics. It’s about creating the memory of a lifetime. Sign up to participate at Mad River Mountain here: https://savagerace.com/event/ohio-2024/

After the race, enjoy 15% off food and merch for anyone wearing their Savage Race medal or t-shirt.

item.content:encoded:
Mark Your Calendars for the July Sidewalk Sales in Downtown Bellefontaine!

Get ready for spectacular sales and a fun-filled shop hop through our charming downtown! Save the dates for July 5-7 and prepare to discover amazing deals and unique finds at our local businesses, brought to you with support from our sponsor, the Logan County Visitors Bureau.

We'll be sharing more details about what our businesses will be offering as the event approaches, so make sure to save the date and stay tuned!

Don’t miss out on this chance to shop till you drop and snag some fantastic bargains, all while enjoying the best of what our community has to offer. See you on the sidewalks!

item.title: 2024 Crawfish Boil Featuring Bent Water Brewing Co.
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
GET TICKETS: https://app.moonclerk.com/pay/7bxtzm9q73w2

We are excited to partner with Bent Water Brewing for our 2024 Crawfish Boil on Tuesday, June 25th from 6-10 PM!

Bent Water Brewing was born from the mind of Bellefontaine native, Aaron Reams who is a scientist, artist, and beer enthusiast. From there, the Bent Water team formed, drawing in unique expertise to strike a balance between the artistic and scientific complexities of brewing and operating a brewery. The result? Ingenuity & Predictability – Creativity & Quality – Variety & Familiarity.

Bent Water Brewing is proud to call Lynn, MA home because of the city’s rich industrial roots and superior water source. Bent Water believes passion can turn industry into art; and with careful, creative manipulation, they bend water into unique, flavorful beer.

Our Bent Water draft lineup for this year’s event will be:

Pineapple Passion Fruit Kettle Sour
Fruited Sour 5%
Pouring a beautiful yellow hue, the sourness is noticeable but restrained while being refreshing in such a light beer. The addition of fruit during fermentation gives a big tropical aroma and flavor without adding residual sweetness.

Premium Lager
Lager 4.7%
A pre-prohibition lager. What's old is new again and this is a premium version of an American favorite. Retro Style. Modern Taste.

Double Thunder Funk
DIPA 9.2%
The big brother of the best-selling Thunder Funk IPA. This big-bodied West Coast style Double IPA drinks deceptively smooth and delivers big hop flavors. Double the Thunder.

Super Sluice
Hazy DIPA 8%
Sluice Juice is our first, original, most tested, most tried New England IPA. So we powered up that recipe into a bigger, bolder version of our favorite hazy IPA and created SUPER SLUICE!

Megafauna
West Coast IPA 7.9%
Columbus, cascade, chinook, Amarillo, el dorado hops

The all-you-can-eat menu will consist of:
-Crawfish Boil – Fresh Louisiana Crawfish (delivered LIVE the day of the event)
-Andouille Sausage
-Shrimp
-Corn on the Cob
-Onion and Red Potatoes
-Collard Greens w/ Pancetta
-Jalapeño Cheddar Corn Bread w/ Old Bay Compound Butter.

All tickets are general admission and include the menu above, a Bent Water logo beer glass, live music from Tucker Munz, and your first beer. Not to mention access to a private party in the Syndicate beer garden!

Four Acre Clothing will be on-site, live printing event tee shirts from their mobile print truck.

This event is 21+

If you would like to be seated with a particular party outside of your tickets, please specify the name(s) of the individuals in the custom question area during checkout. We will do our best to accommodate your request, but it is not guaranteed. There are 6 seats at each picnic table.

*Should the event need to be moved due to weather, the event will be moved to the following day, June 26th, and will be announced 24 hours in advance.

GET TICKETS: https://app.moonclerk.com/pay/7bxtzm9q73w2

Brunch Saturday and Sunday 10-2

item.title: Taste of Bellefontaine
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for this year's Taste of Bellefontaine where we've partnered with the Logan County Farmers Market to bring you a delightful evening of delicious samples and shopping! Explore the local downtown eateries and savor a variety of tasty treats.

In addition to the mouthwatering samples, we are excited to feature a special edition of the First Friday Logan County Farmers Market. The Farmer’s Market vendors will be set up and ready to showcase and sell their amazing goods.

Enjoy live music as you stroll through downtown, try food from our local restaurants, and discover the hidden gems of our community. Don't miss this tasty evening in downtown Bellefontaine – it's the perfect opportunity to support local businesses and enjoy a fun, flavorful night out!

item.title: Roundhouse 6th Anniversary Party

item.title: Broadway in Love
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for the Holland Presents Season Opener!

Prepare to be swept off your feet by Broadway in Love, the concert experience that’s been exhilarating audiences around the country. Discover the laughter, the thrills and the chills of Broadway’s greatest songs as shared by real-life Broadway married couple Libby Servais (Glinda from Broadway’s “Wicked”) and Stephan Stubbins (from Broadway’s “Mary Poppins”).

item.title: The Jungle Book KIDS
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Local grade school children take the stage for this kids' musical version of Disney's The Jungle Book. Come enjoy the classic story of Mowgli and friends and support these budding thespians as they showcase the results of their hard work!

The show will last about 45 minutes.

Performances are 7 p.m. Friday, July 12, and 2 p.m. Saturday, July 13.

item.title: The Craig & Will Duo Live!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Join us for jazz piano and vocal stylings of yesterday, today, and tomorrow. Craig & Will will be performing during dinner service while the Art, Wine, & Jazz Fest is happening in Downtown Bellefontaine. No cover charge. Make a reservation at https://resy.com/cities/bellefontaine-oh/venues/the-syndicate

item.title: A Special Evening with Even Stevens & Mike Loudermilk
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Join us for a special Tuesday Dinner service in our Syndicate Beer Garden featuring Mike Loudermilk and Even Stevens. These incredible song writing legends will showcase their talent and perform some of their biggest hits. We will be offering chef features as well as our full dinner and cocktail menu. No cover charge! Book a table here: https://resy.com/cities/bellefontaine-oh/venues/the-syndicate/events/a-special-evening-with-even-stevens-mike-loudermilk-2024-08-20

item.title: Steaks & Stogies
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Doors open at 5:30 PM. Your dinner includes salad, an 8 oz Grilled Sirloin Steak with Red Skin Smashed Potatoes & Garlicy Green Beans, two drink tickets, and two cigars. (A Diesel Robusto and an Enclave Broadleaf by AJ Fernandez Robusto) Cigars provided our amazing neighbors at The Craft Emporium. We will have a full cocktail menu available as well as some of our favorite bourbons and scotches.

Tickets available here: https://resy.com/cities/bellefontaine-oh/venues/the-syndicate/events/steaks-stogies-2024-08-06

item.title: Dine to Donate: Journey Nature School
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
•PLEASE JOIN US, MONDAY, AUGUST 9TH•
DINE TO DONATE: JOURNEY NATURE SCHOOL
•10% of ALL sales go towards JNS
•DINE-IN OR CARRY-OUT•

Journey Nature School (JNS) is a preschool alternative or homeschool supplement for children ages 3-7 years old with Summer Camp, Toddler Series', and Free Forest School options for families. This program combines Reggio Emilia, and Montessori educational philosophies in a nature immersive setting. Through these approaches, children engage in learning experiences that value their problem solving, critical thinking, self-regulation, and communication skills while adequately meeting social-emotional needs.

Find out more at www.journeynatureschool.com

Proceeds from this benefit go toward enhancing music programming materials, educator training resources, and STEM materials for students!

item.title: Harry Potter Trivia
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Attention wizards, witches, and muggles alike, prepare your wands and get ready to put your Hogwarts knowledge to the test. We will be brewing up butter beers and lots of other tasty drinks!!

Prizes include glassware, shirts, and gift cards.
No need to come with a team (or do), you can sign up when you get here to have a good time.
For future events, visit our Facebook events page.
Admission is free for this event

item.title: Paint & Plant Garden Party
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Dive into your artistic side by creating your very own succulent-themed painting, guided by our expert instructors. But that’s not all—our local plant shop, Eden Haus will be on hand with a special succulent bar, offering a unique opportunity to craft your own custom succulent arrangements. Choose from a variety of plants and decorative elements to design a personalized garden piece to take home.

Want to add candles to your craft day? Join us 30-60 minutes prior to your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you learn stained glass and be ready to take home with you after class!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Sunday, August 25th from 2-5PM. Painting and instructions provided by Jessica from Triple Moon. Succulent bar and all the fixins’ provided by Eden Haus, our local plant shop! All materials will be provided.

Tickets:
- $45 per guest and you get to take home your finished projects.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via eventbrite refund option or email triplemoonproducts@gmail.com.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- No children under the age of 10 please.

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge & Candle Bar at 117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Mandala Moon Stained Glass Workshop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn

Our expert instructor will guide you through the art of stained glass! This is a beginner friendly workshop explaining the steps and techniques and helping you create your very own Moon Stained Glass piece. All materials will be provided, so just bring yourself and your enthusiasm!

Want to add candles to your craft day? Join us 30-60 minutes prior to your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you learn stained glass and be ready to take home with you after class!

item.title: Upcycled Pop Up Shop with B. Marie
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a fabulous day of unique and creative finds at our Upcycled Clothing Pop-Up Shop, featuring the talented Brooke from B. Marie Pop-up! Brooke’s incredible designs breathe new life into pre-loved clothes, transforming them into one-of-a-kind pieces that you will LOVE.

Make a day of it: start with a delicious coffee, explore the local farmers market, and then swing by our pop-up shop to discover Brooke’s amazing creations. While you’re here, don’t miss the chance to make your own custom candle at our candle bar.

It’s a perfect day of shopping, creativity, and fun—see you there!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Saturday, August 17th. B. Marie will be set up from 11am-7pm, for shopping her up-cycled clothing line. There is a fitting room for trying on clothing.

item.title: Logan County Tourism Week
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
We are so excited to celebrate tourism in Logan County! We have an entire week of fun planned all around Logan County. Passports with coupons will be available at the attractions listed along with the Logan County Visitors Bureau (100 S. Main, Bellefontaine) soon.

Download the passport here: https://www.experiencelogancounty.com/uploads/1/4/6/1/146154761/loco-vb-tourism-week-palm-card-07.24.24.pdf

Schedule of Events:

Friday, August 2nd –
Cornhole Board Unveiling at Russells Point Municipal Park at 12:00pm
First Fridays Taste of Bellefontaine – 5-8pm (Tickets available at ffbellefontaine.com)

Saturday, August 3rd –
Rock the Lake (FREE Concert by RISE FM) at Old Field Beach 5:30pm – 11252 OH-235, Lakeview
Feed the animals and play putt-putt at Marmon Valley Farm for $3 -10am-5pm (Pony Ride Reservations available by calling 937-593-8000) – 7754 OH-292, Zanesfield

Sunday, August 4th – Check off a stop on the Logan County Pizza Trail or the Logan County Ice Cream Trail!

Monday, August 5th –
FREE Nature Discovery Day at Indian Lake State Park Nature Center 4-6pm – Indian Lake State Park – 13156 OH-235, Lakeview
FREE Putt-Putt at The Root Beer Stand – 8080 OH-366, Russells Point

Tuesday, August 6th –
FREE Historic Boat Tour with Spend-A-Day 9am-12pm at Russells Point Harbor (across from The Donut Shop) – 104 W. Main St, Russells Point

FREE Donut at The Donut Shop (coupon found on passport) – 104 W. Main St, Russells Point

Wednesday, August 7th –
FREE Admission to the Logan County History Center to explore all 3 museums 12-4pm – 521 E. Columbus Ave, Bellefontaine

FREE Buttercream Iced Sugar Cookie at City Sweets and Creamery (coupon found on passport) – 222 S. Main St, Bellefontaine

Thursday, August 8th –
Free Gem Mining at Ohio Caverns 9am-5pm – 2210 OH-245 E, West Liberty

Discounted Piatt Castle Mac-A-Cheek Tours 10am-5pm – 10051 Twp Rd. 47, West Liberty

FREE kids dip at Stoner’s Ice Cream Parlor (coupon found on passport) – 100 S. Detroit St, West Liberty

Friday, August 9th - Umbrella Avenue Unveiling and Open House at Rainbow Row 3-5pm – 114 W. Chillicothe Ave, Bellefontaine

Saturday, August 10th – Wacky Boat Races at Lakeview Harbor – 8:30am-12pm – Intersection of OH-235 and Oh-366, Lakeview

FREE Behind the Scenes tour of the Holland Theatre – 6-8pm – 127 E. Columbus Ave, Bellefontaine

Hot Summer Nights Cruise-In – Downtown Bellefontaine – 5-9pm

All Week:
Free Admission to Indian Lake Tiny Museum – get a FREE Indian Lake post card for visiting & $10 drop-in archery lessons at Indian Lake Outfitters – 115 E. Lake St, Lakeview (Tuesday – Saturday)

item.title: Umbrella Avenue Unveiling & Open House
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join the Small Nation team for the unveiling of Downtown Bellefontaine’s newest installation and attraction, Umbrella Avenue! 

Enjoy an open house of Rainbow Row Bellefontaine and see what all the businesses have to offer. Light refreshments will be served!

 Meet the Author: Meet Brandy Gleason, travel author and founder of the Ohio Road Trips Facebook group, as she joins the party for a book signing of her newest book, 100 Things to Do in Ohio Before You Die.

item.title: Sunday Funday Featuring SaMax
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: After a lengthy hiatus, Sam, Max and the gang are reuniting for a Sunday Funday dinner + show at The Syndicate. Come get your much needed SaMax fix! No cover charge! Reserve a table here: https://resy.com/cities/bellefontaine-oh/venues/the-syndicate/events/sa-max-2024-07-28

item.title: Downtown Bellefontaine Toss 'n Tour
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Downtown Bellefontaine Toss n Tour on Saturday, July 27, from 2-5 PM!

Think Cornhole meets fun as you travel to and from our businesses, each with unique Cornhole challenges. No two holes are the same! 

Form your four-person team for just $40. Prizes will be awarded for:
 Top three teams
 Best team name
 Best dressed team

Grab your 4-person team, create the best team name, dress the part, and join our Toss n Tour event! This is a fantastic way to explore what downtown Bellefontaine has to offer. 

Grab a DORA drink and let’s go! This is sure to be one of our most popular events! Teams will also take advantage of exclusive drink discounts and store specials!

Don't miss out on the fun—sign up today!

item.title: Hogwarts Canvas & Candlelight
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate the return to Hogwarts on September 1st with an enchanting evening of magic and creativity! As the new school year begins, join us for two spellbinding activities:

 Paint Your Magic: create your own Starry Hogwarts Night on canvas. Whether you’re a daring Gryffindor, a cunning Slytherin, a wise Ravenclaw, or a loyal Hufflepuff, your artistic vision will shine through, transforming your canvas into a magical masterpiece.

 Illuminate Your House: Unleash your inner potion master as you create a candle that embodies the very essence of your favorite house. Choose from a selection of captivating scents and colors that reflect the unique spirit of Gryffindor’s bravery, Slytherin’s ambition, Ravenclaw’s wisdom, or Hufflepuff’s loyalty. Light your candle and let its glow fill your space with the warmth and magic of Hogwarts.

 Dress in your robes and house colors and prepare for a night of magical camaraderie and creative exploration. This is not just an event—it’s a journey into the heart of the wizarding world, where every moment sparkles with possibility. Join us, and let the magic of Hogwarts ignite your creativity and illuminate your night.

Spaces are enchantedly limited, so secure your spot now for a spellbinding evening that promises to be the highlight of your magical adventures.

 Accio Creativity! 

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Sunday, September 1st from 2:00 PM- 6:00 PM. We are making house candles and painting a Hogwarts Starry Night scene on canvas (instructor led).

Tickets:
- $50 per guest and you get to take home your finished candle and painting.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via Eventbrite or triplemoonproducts@gmail.com.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- No children under the age of 8 please. We are putting an age limit on this because our candle bar is ages 8 and up and the painting requires a bit more focus this time.

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Back to School Reed Diffuser Workshop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for our fabulous Reed Diffuser Workshop, where you can wave goodbye to smelly kid problems with our flameless, kid-proof reed diffusers! Dive into a world of scent-sational fun as you pick the perfect diffuser and blend your very own Classroom Fragrance. It’s the perfect way to keep your classroom smelling great and feeling welcoming. Come mix, mingle, and make your classroom the freshest place to learn!

Not a teacher? No problem! If you love flameless scent options, you’re more than welcome to join the fun. Plus, our candle bar will be open! You can create a custom candle that matches the scent you blend for your home, or make a separate unique candle while you’re here.

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Sunday, August 18th from 11:00AM to 7:00PM. Our scent sommelier will help you blend the perfect custom classroom fragrance for your new reed diffuser! This is an all day event, so snag a ticket now and stop by anytime August 18th to make your diffuser.

Tickets:
- $35 per guest and you get to take home you finished reed diffuser filled with fragrance.
- Bring a friend and receive a $5 coupon good for any candle bar experience (Same day or future). Bring 5 friends and get a free candle!
- Candle bar experience is not included in the ticket price. Ticket. Covers a new reed diffuser, reeds, and the fill-up of your diffuser with your custom scent.

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Fall Candle Flights Weekend
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Dive into the cozy vibes, taking your time to explore and mix our array of fragrances to create your perfect flight of fall candles. Celebrate the fall equinox with your besties as you custom blend four unique fall candles. Each candle is housed in a high-end glass vessel, all in beautiful fall color schemes.
As the nights grow longer, light up your home with the warm glow and inviting scents that embody the magic of the season. Welcome autumn in style, and let the cozy ambiance envelop you in pure autumnal bliss.

The Details:
Mark your calendars for the weekend of September 19th through the fall equinox, September 22nd (Thursday-Sunday). Once you have purchased a ticket, you will be able to come in during open hours that weekend and make your flights with your friends!

Hours:
- Thursday and Friday 12:00PM-7:00PM
- Saturday and Sunday 11:00AM-7:00PM
- Candles take 2-3 hours to cure before you can take them home! You’re welcome to pick up same day or any other time we are open. We can also ship.

We have two candle flight options, our large flight is 4 candles for $100 and our small flight is 4 candles for $50. We have 4 different fall colored, high-end, glass vessels for each flight. Large flight vessels come with lids. You get to customize your fragrance blend for each candle in your flight (aka you get 4 different candles to take home!).

Tickets:
- $100 per large flight and $50 per small flight.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s a 7 day notice, you may request a refund via Eventbrite or triplemoonproducts@gmail.com.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- No children under the age of 8 please. We are putting an age limit on this because our candle bar is ages 8 and up.

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Name That Tune at Roundhouse
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Join us for our first ever Name that Tune with Sinners Like Us hosting. It will be fun filled evening of tunes. Also Joining us will be Back Alley Eatzz serving 5-8

item.title: The Cruise-In Concert
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Route 4 Live Presents: The Cruise-In Concert! Alan Carl, Tucker Munz, and Ian Thomas Hayes Live on the Citizens Federal Stage!

NEED TO KNOW:
Doors open at 5:30 PM for this all ages show. Adirondack chairs and standing room is available on a first-come first-serve basis. There is no charge for General Admission. To reserve a ticket or upgrade to reserved seating or VIP, click here: https://resy.com/.../the-cruise-in-concert-2024-08-10-2

Stop in during the Hot Summer Nights Cruise-In for a great meal, delicious cocktails, special giveaways, and country music in our beer garden on the Citizens Federal Stage. These three musicians are taking the industry by storm!

With roots firmly planted in the blue-collar soil of Ohio, Alan Carl emerges as a powerhouse in the world of modern day country music. Alan's talent caught the spotlight on the national stage of American Idol in 2021, where he earned the coveted Golden Ticket to Hollywood.

Bellefontaine’s own Tucker Munz has been rocking the local music scene! His mixture of red dirt country and rock as well as acoustic folk music will captivate you.

Ian Thomas Hayes brings a powerful country sound infused with a modern twist. His music is a seamless blend of traditional country storytelling, heartfelt lyrics, and melodic hooks that captivate audiences.

Grab your friends for a special evening! https://resy.com/.../the-cruise-in-concert-2024-08-10-2

Thanks to our sponsors: Integrity Ford, Applied Electric, and Logan Dental Care.

item.title: Spooky Stained Glass Workshop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a Spooky Stained Glass Workshop where you’ll craft a one-of-a-kind glass Polaroid featuring two adorable ghosties! In this enchanting session, you’ll learn the art of stained glass from start to finish, guided by expert instructors. Whether you’re a seasoned crafter or a complete beginner, this hands-on workshop will leave you with a boo-tiful piece of art perfect for Halloween or year-round charm. Get ready for a ghostly good time, some creative fun, and a take-home masterpiece that’s hauntingly unique!

Want to add candles to your craft day (we are a candle bar!) Join us 30-60 minutes prior to your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you learn stained glass and be ready to take home with you after class!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Saturday, September 14th from 2:00-5:00 PM. Our guest instructor for this event is Stacey from Windyknolls Stained Glass. All materials will be provided. Long pants and closed toed shoes are recommended.

Tickets:
- $65 per guest and you get to take home your finished project.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via Windyknolls Stained Glass.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- No children please, 18 and older (the irons too hot!)
- Only shop tickets from the ticket link! Do not attempt purchase from random people (scams)

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Pete Moss Live
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Pete Moss is a musician born and raised in Bellefontaine, OH. Though he specializes in country, he prides himself on branching out having a sense of variety.

You can find Pete on Instagram(@thepetemoss) & TikTok(@petemoss_).

item.title: Keaton James Fout Live
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Keaton Fout is a 24 year old from Southern Hardin County, OH. Keaton plays a unique mixture of classic country music, blended with his own modern style. He loves to play the older songs from people such as: Hank Williams Jr., Charlie Daniels, and Merle Haggard. His modern influences include: Zach Bryan, Tyler Childers, and many more popular artists from the modern age. He also writes and records his own original songs that you can find anywhere you listen to music.
