item.title: Art, Wine & Jazz Fest
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Event: Art, Wine & Jazz - Second Line Fest

 Date: Saturday, September 7
 Time: 2-5 PM
 Location: Downtown Bellefontaine

Join us for an unforgettable afternoon at the Art, Wine & Jazz - Second Line Fest, proudly sponsored by The Steinhelfer Firm and Minnich Law Offices. This ticketed wine tasting event offers a unique experience combining the best of art, wine, and jazz in our charming downtown.

Wine Tasting:
Purchase your ticket and receive access to sample 10 exquisite wines of your choice, curated by our very own Bella Vino Wine Room. Tastings will be held across various local downtown businesses, allowing you to explore and enjoy the community.
Be entertained by a local jazz band and the easy listening sounds of street musician Pete Moss, creating the perfect atmosphere for a relaxing and enjoyable afternoon.
Feeling festive? Join the parade through the streets as part of the ‘second line’ following the jazz performance. This lively tradition adds a unique and fun twist to the event.

Don’t miss this opportunity to sip and stroll with us, enjoying great wine, wonderful music, and the vibrant community spirit of downtown Bellefontaine.

Tickets are on sale now. Secure yours today and get ready for an afternoon of wine, music, and fun!

Grab your tickets and enjoy a delightful afternoon with us!

item.title: Windmill Productions: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Local actors present this timeless drama.

Matt and Christina Drayton are a progressive white couple living in San Francisco. It is 1967 when their daughter Joanna arrives home unexpectedly with Dr. John Prentice, an African-American doctor eleven years her senior. They’re in love and they want the Draytons’ blessing for their marriage – today.

item.title: Malachi Jaggers
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Malachi's songs blow modern country music backwards, invoking nostalgic feelings of historic family ties, railroads, and heartland America.

He's forging his own brand of hopeful, relatable Americana, pulling from personal experience to connect with audiences on a deeply human level. Jagger’s songs are written with a captivating honesty rarely found in modern music. He’s also an open, vulnerable songwriter: From the richly narrative lyrics to the melodic hooks, his work is infused with compassion and authenticity.

item.title: Greg and Dana Newkirk's Haunted Objects LIVE!
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Are you ready to uncover the chilling true stories behind the world’s most haunted objects? Join Greg and Dana Newkirk (Travel Channel’s “Kindred Spirits”, Amazon Prime’s “Hellier”) for an interactive presentation that will leave you on the edge of your seat.

As two of the world’s only full-time paranormal investigators, the Newkirks have spent their lives collecting and caring for cursed artifacts, possessed dolls, and other creepy artifacts said to display supernatural activity. Now you can experience their spine-tingling true tales yourself!

VIP seats include a Meet & Greet after the show with the Newkirks!

item.title: Etta May
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Winner of the prestigious American Comedy Awards “Comic of the Year,” this Kentucky woman is a comedy icon!

Hailed as the “Polyester Princess,” the reigning Queen of Southern Sass delivers a G-rated, high-powered, take-no-prisoners performance full of truth, irony, humor and wisdom. This trailer park goddess has appeared on Oprah, Showtime, CMT, CBS Sunday Morning, ABC, Columbia Pictures, and NBC.

Opening the evening will be Carollynn Xavier, better known as the Recovering Californian -- a fast-rising social media STAR!

item.title: Billy Bob Thornton & The Boxmasters
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Formed in 2007, The Boxmasters have recorded an impressive and diverse catalog of music that touches on their love of a wide array of influences which, most importantly, includes the rock and roll of the 1960’s. Listening to The Boxmasters, one can hear obvious odes to the Beatles, Byrds, Beach Boys, The Mothers of Invention, Kris Kristofferson, John Prine and Big Star.

Fran Moran & The Nervous Wrecks will open the evening.

item.title: Survivor Celebration & Recognition
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Logan County breast cancer survivors, family and friends are invited to celebrate life and one another as we bring awareness to a highly treatable disease. Join us at the Holland Theater for fellowship. Hear words of inspiration and encouragement from local breast cancer survivor Melinda Knueve.

Breast cancer survivors should register for the event at https://www.maryrutan.org/forms/pink2024/

item.title: The Great Pumpkin Walk
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join Us for the Great Pumpkin Walk in Downtown Bellefontaine!
Sponsored by Small Nation

Get ready for one of downtown Bellefontaine's favorite events! This year’s Great Pumpkin Walk is packed with fun, and we’ve added even more exciting attractions that you won’t want to miss. We will have vendors and food trucks available as well as activities listed below!

Event Details:

  • Date: Saturday, October 5th
  • Time: 2:00 PM – 6:00 PM
  • Location: Downtown Bellefontaine

Free Activities: Enjoy a petting zoo, trick-or-treating at retail locations, and a costume contest for all ages—bring your best costume!

Kids' Passport ($15): Grants access to:

  • 6 bouncy houses (unlimited bounces)
  • Popcorn Walk Contest (with a chance to win prizes)
  • Unlimited hayrides through downtown
  • Free entry to the caramel apple bar to create your own treat!

Family Pass ($25): Includes 2 kids' passports for a great deal!

Important: Each child will need their own passport for the paid activities. Check-in at the courthouse to receive your VIP wristband.

For questions or more information, contact Maddie Stotler, our Downtown Event Coordinator, at (937) 303-7581.

We can’t wait to see you in downtown Bellefontaine!

item.title: Artrageous
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Holland Theatre and LoCo Art present this outrageous adventure of arts: the ONLY show where you can witness the fusion of live art, rock concert, imaginative movement, vocal performance, comedy, blacklight Bunraku, Artpunk wear, and inclusion in one magical experience.

Prepare to be swept away on a tide of artistic immersion like never before with the Artrageous Show! The Artrageous experience transcends the traditional confines of a show. It’s the ultimate immersive family experience that invites you to step into the canvas of imagination.

item.title: The Birds
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
The Holland Free Movie Series kicks off with a Halloween classic!

Director Alfred Hitchcock's apocalyptic, allegorical thriller depicts an avian assault on a California coastal town. Melanie Daniels is a modern rich socialite, a jet-setter who always gets what she wants. When lawyer Mitch Brenner sees her in a pet shop, he plays something of a practical joke on her, and she decides to return the favor. She drives about an hour north of San Francisco to Bodega Bay, where Mitch spends the weekends with his mother Lydia and younger sister Cathy. Soon after her arrival, however, the birds in the area begin to act strangely.

(PG-13 | 1 hr 59 min)

item.title: Jason Petty's Hank & My Honky Tonk Heroes: 100 Years of Hank Williams
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Jason Petty celebrates Hank Williams’ 100th birthday with his critically acclaimed tribute, “Hank and My Honky Tonk Heroes.”

Williams penned over 400 country songs depicting the trials and tribulations of the common man and woman. Among his timeless classics are “Hey Good Lookin’,” “Your Cheatin’ Heart,” “I’m So Lonesome I Could Cry,” “Jambalaya,” and “I Saw The Light.” Williams is credited with creating the style that would influence other artists such as Patsy Cline, George Jones, Merle Haggard and Elvis Presley.
He is considered the single most influential person in country music history and is enshrined in the Country Music Hall of Fame, the Songwriters Hall of Fame and the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame.

item.title: Luca Stricagnoli
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Mesmerizing Italian acoustic guitarist Luca Stricagnoli appears for the first time at the Holland! His jaw-dropping virtuosity includes playing up to five guitars at the same time.

Stricagnoli’s repertoire, performed on double and triple neck guitars he himself designed, includes a blend of popular songs from contemporary rock, film scores and mind-bending originals. He has released four albums and has over 200 million views on Youtube.

item.title: One Christmas Night in Memphis
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Imagine Johnny Cash, Carl Perkins, Elvis Presley and Jerry Lee Lewis celebrating the yuletide season with their legendary hit songs as well as everyone’s favorite holiday songs – including “Jingle Bell Rock,” “White Christmas,” “Winter Wonderland”, “Run, Run, Rudolph,” “Blue Christmas,” and many more.

It’s 90 minutes of rockabilly, country, gospel and 1950’s rock and roll mixed in with festive holiday classics and presented in a Holly, Jolly fashion!

item.title: Madcap Puppets: The Nutcracker
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Clara needs a little help from The Nutcracker to keep the Sugarplum Fairy from spoiling the holiday festival! Madcap twists this classic story into a fantastically funny tale, filled with giant puppets, comical characters, and audience participation.

item.title: West Central Ohio Community Concert Band Holiday Concert
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Come enjoy the sounds of the season at this FREE concert!

Now in its 31st season, the West Central Ohio Community Concert Band is under the direction of Myles Bowers. The all-volunteer band includes amateur musicians, professional musicians, educators, and students hailing from multiple Ohio counties. Tickets for this popular annual event are available on a first-come, first-served basis.

item.title: Annual FREE Christmas Movie & Santa Visit
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Come join staff members from the Logan County Sheriff's Office for an afternoon movie.

Santa will be visiting after the movie as well.

item.title: Lima Symphony Orchestra | Bells, Brass & Bows
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate the holidays with Bells, Brass & Bows as the Lima Symphony Orchestra under the musical directions of Andrew Crust brings cherished Christmas films to life. Listen to the hauntingly beautiful soundtrack from The Nightmare Before Christmas, comical tunes from How the Grinch Stole Christmas, and the festive music of The Polar Express.

Continuing an annual tradition, sing along with sacred hymns and beloved carols, then delight in the concluding piece: Tchaikovsky’s Nutcracker Suite.

Limited table seating is available for an extra-special night.

item.title: 90's Hip Hop Trivia
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Do you know 90's Hip Hop? Come prove it!

We will be sippin' on Gin & Juice, and Colt 45 forties while testing your knowledge of what was arguably the best decade of hip hop music.

Prizes include glassware, shirts, and gift cards.
No need to come with a team (or do), you can sign up when you get here to have a good time.
For future events, visit our Facebook events page.
Admission is free for this event

item.title: 2nd Annual Steinholding Competiton feat. Hi-Wire Zirkusfest
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us at Brewfontaine for our 2nd Annual Steinholding Competition!
The competition will begin at 6:30pm on the front sidewalk during the BHS Homecoming parade. You can sign up when you get here.
The winner of the competition will get to keep the Hi-Wire 1 Liter stein, one free stein fill of Hi-Wire Zircusfest, and $20.00 Brewfontaine gift card.

Official Steinholding Rules can be found here: https://www.ussteinholding.com/.../official-steinholding...

item.title: One Year Anniversary Party | Spooky Paint & Sip
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Cheers to One Year! 
We’re celebrating our one-year anniversary, and we want YOU to join the fun!

Grab your girls and head over to Triple Moon Design Co. for a special anniversary Paint & Sip!  Choose your masterpiece—an adorable ghost with flowers or a whimsical pumpkin decked out in spiderwebs and blooms. Perfect for spooky season with a touch of charm! 

Whether you’re a painting pro or a first-timer, we’ll guide you step-by-step to create a project that’s totally boo-tiful! Adults, grab your wine, and feel free to bring the kiddos too. It’s the perfect Girls’ Night Out—fun, relaxing, and full of creativity!

Celebrate with us and make memories that will last long past the paint drying!  Grab your tickets now!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Friday, October 4th from 6:00PM to 8:30 PM. We understand getting off work and getting everyone together to the place on time can be challenging so don’t worry if you can’t make it until 6 or so, that’s fine. Just shoot me a message so I know you’ll be a little bit behind.

Tickets:
- $30 per guest and you get to take home your finished project.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via eventbrite or triplemoonproducts@gmail.com.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Stop in 1 hour before your event to make candles! Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Triple Moon Designs, 117 W Columbus Ave

item.title: Roundhouse Depot/Brewfontaine Collab Release: Ichabod Train
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Stop in during the Downtown Pumpkin walk and try Ichabod Train, an exclusive collaboration with Brewfontaine and Roundhouse Depot Brewing Co!
This Pumpkin Pie cream ale is loaded with pumpkin and spices, perfect for the season. Both locations will start pouring at noon. Be sure to grab a DORA cup of Ichabod Train and walk the town to check out the festivities!!

item.title: Spooktacular Stained Glass Workshop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
In this enchanting session, you’ll learn the art of stained glass from start to finish, guided by expert instructors. Whether you’re a seasoned crafter or a complete beginner, this hands-on workshop will leave you with a boo-tiful piece of art perfect for Halloween or year-round charm. Get ready for a ghostly good time, some creative fun, and a take-home masterpiece that’s hauntingly unique!

Want to add candles to your craft day? Join us 30-60 minutes prior to your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you learn stained glass and be ready to take home with you after class!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Saturday, October 12th from 2:00-5:00 PM. Our guest instructor for this event is Stacey from Windyknolls Stained Glass. All materials will be provided. Long pants and closed toed shoes are recommended.

Tickets:
- $65 per guest and you get to take home your finished project.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via Windyknolls Stained Glass.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- No children please, 18 and older (the irons too hot!)

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: 2nd Annual Zero K Fun Run
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
October 20th
Noon-Whenever You Want

Have you ever wanted to run a 5K but you’re too damn lazy and they never have beer? Well, we have just the event for you! You can run, jog, walk or crawl this race with all of the beer breaks you need.

Join us for the 2nd Annual Zero K Fun Run in Downtown Bellefontaine. BTown’s craft beer dream team made the trip to Derive Brewing in Clintonville and brewed up some very special beers for this event. You can run, jog, walk or crawl this race with all of the beer breaks you need. Sweat bands, leg warmers, track suits and shortie shorts are encouraged and a prize will be awarded for our favorite outfit. Special release tappings and can releases will be scheduled throughout the day at each location. Grab a DORA cup and make the trip back and forth as many times as you want!

ON YOUR MARKS…GET SET…
Participants start at Brewfontaine
- Grab your race bibs and drink tickets
- Pre-race stretching clinic lead by none other than long time runner and beer drinker, Scotty Elliot!
- Relax and enjoy your 1st beer, the Zer0K OG!

12:45 PM PIT STOP FOR A GROUP PHOTO!
Participants "Run" Through Craft Emporium
-Meet Derive Brewing
-Grab Your Zer0K Headband (if you chose that ticket option)
-Water Hydration Station!

1:00 PM BROWNS VS BENGALS KICKOFF
Participants Run to Roundhouse Depot Brewing
-Release of the Zer0K Orange Julius Variant!

2nd Qtr & Halftime CANDY CRAZE COLLABORATION!!
Participants run back to Brewfontaine
-A very special variant of Zer0K - Pink Starburst Candy infused!
-Pink Starburst provided by Candy Craze

3rd & 4th Qtr SPECIAL RELEASE AT ROUNDHOUSE DEPOT BREWING
Participants head back to RDBC
-Spooky Train will be released! Its Spicy Pumpkin SZN NOTE - -Spooky Train is NOT included in your entry fee

POST-GAME AWARDS CEREMONY/FINISH LINE AT THE CRAFT EMPORIUM
Participants sprint to The Craft Emporium Finish Line
-Grab your final beer included in your ticket
-The Zer0K OG and Orange Julius singles/packs also available for carry-out
-Winners of Best Outfit will be named and trophy awarded!

Tickets available here: https://app.moonclerk.com/pay/5a4bs0v56jtt

item.title: Holland New Projector Drive
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Our current movie projector is old and on its last legs! We need your help to raise funds to replace it with a 4K laser projector -- providing a higher resolution and three times the brightness.

This fun event includes classic rock from Band of Ravens, piano tunes from Tom Boone, jazz with the Starliners, and classical selections from Miriam Stoner and Daniel Colalillo.

Audience members can bid on silent auction items, including original movie memorabilia, all afternoon. A live auction will take place at intermission -- bid on hotel stays, overnight stays at Bellefontaine’s The Flats, a private movie showing and more!

Main floor seating includes wine, soft drinks, refreshments from local eateries, and a raffle ticket; balcony seating includes a raffle ticket.

item.content:encoded:

Whether you’re a fan of classic monsters or modern slasher flicks, this event is designed to thrill and entertain. As always, it's free to play. item.title: Halloween Cookie Class at Triple Moon
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a frightfully fun Halloween cookie decorating class, where you’ll learn to decorate like a pro! In this hands-on workshop, professional baker Emily will guide you through the tips and techniques of working with royal icing to create a set of six hauntingly fun cookie designs. Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced decorator, this class offers the perfect opportunity to get creative and enjoy some Halloween fun. Best of all, you get to eat your deliciously spooky creations when you’re done! Grab your friends and join us for a fang-tastic time!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Sunday, October 27th from 11:00AM to 1:00 PM. Our guest instructor is professional baker, Emily, from Rosie Cheeks bakery. She will be walking us through how to decorate our Halloween cookie set with royal icing.

The Tickets:
- $45 per guest and you get to take home your finished cookie set.
- Ages 7+ recommended
- Due to the nature of this event all sales are final and refunds will not be permitted.
- You must be registered ahead of time for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

Are you ready for it….
The kids are away so the Witches can Play! It’s time to fly into Bellefontaine for
2024’s "Witches Night Out"! It’s our second year and the Coven keeps growing, this year they’ll be 20+ Businesses “Getting Witchy” with it! A Dora Friendly Evening, one night only, Thursday, Oct. 24th from 5-8pm.
Yes, you can be “100% that Witch!” Grab your Best Witches, come Shop a Spell while enjoying Concoctions, Refreshments & FREE Shopping Passports at every participating location. All have summoned their “Spookiest Best Deals” of the season! 
Enter to WIN in our “Boo Basket” Drawings! Winners announced Friday, Oct. 25th.
 Come dressed to impress in your best Witch attire... and of course, Broom Parking  is always Free!

item.title: John Whitehead Live
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Born and raised in Bellefontaine, OH, John has been obsessed with music from a young age. From the early days playing in garage bands, to his self-exploration with Apple’s GarageBand, music has always played a formative role in John’s life. His most recent musical direction is the culmination of a life lived through music.

item.title: Sweetest Day Dinner for Two at the Syndicate

item.content:encoded: Treat your special someone to dinner for two! The Sweetest Day dinner menu for two includes: 7 oz choice sirloin steak, béarnaise, jumbo crab stuffed prawn scampi, garlic smashed potatoes, grilled asparagus, side salad, & shareable dessert for just $75 per couple! item.title: Brunch With Santa at the Syndicate
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: He's making a list and he's checking it twice. He's coming to The Syndicate BOTH Saturday and Sunday to find out who's been naughty or nice! Join us for a magical brunch and photos with Santa! Our full brunch menu will be available as well as Santa crafts and holiday drinks for you and your kiddos. A dine-in entree purchase is required to enjoy all of the Santa activities. Book your reservation on the RESY app or at https://resy.com/.../bellefontaine-oh/venues/the-syndicate

Our full dinner menu will be available in addition to special chef features and holiday cocktails. Doors open at 5:00 PM and the show starts at 6:00 PM. item.title: David Anthony: An Evening of Magic and Hypnosis
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready to experience mind-blowing magic and laugh-out-loud comedy hypnosis in this fun-filled evening!

An international award-winning entertainer from Cleveland, Ohio, David Anthony will present his amazing magic routines in the first half of the show. In the second half, YOU become the star as David invites volunteers on stage to be hypnotized.

item.title: Sourdough Workshop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a hands-on Sourdough Workshop where you'll dive into the delicious world of bread-making!
From mixing the dough to adding your favorite ingredients, shaping, and baking, this workshop covers it all.
Enjoy cocktails and tasty appetizers as you learn the craft of perfecting your sourdough. By the end of the class, you’ll take home your own sourdough starter, a proven recipe, a freshly baked loaf, and a prepped loaf ready for baking at home. You'll also receive a stencil sheet to add your personal touch to your loaves.
As a bonus, one lucky attendee will win a complete sourdough baking kit, including a Dutch oven, banneton, and lame. Don't miss this fun, flavorful event—perfect for bread lovers and beginners alike!

Spots for this workshop are EXTREMELY LIMITED, don't delay.

https://www.eventbrite.com/e/sourdough-workshop-february-2025-tickets-1111952462749

*Ticket Price includes appetizers, instruction and materials. Drinks are sold separately*

item.title: Windmill Productions - The Wizard of Oz: Youth Edition
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Local middle schoolers bring to life the classic tale of Dorothy and her loyal companion Toto as they “Follow the Yellow Brick Road” through the Land of Oz.

They are determined to reach the Emerald City, where the great and powerful Wizard of Oz will help them get home. Along the way, Dorothy encounters witches (both good and bad), Munchkins, talking trees and winged monkeys. Their journey to happiness – and self-awareness – is a glowing testament to friendship, understanding and hope in a world filled with both beauty and ugliness.

item.title: Tucker Munz Live
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
One of our favorite singer/guitarist, Tucker Munz will be covering hits from artist like Tyler Childers & Zach Bryan to classics from Lynyrd Skynyrd & Marshall Tucker Band, with a few originals sprinkled in.
GRAB SOME GOOD FOOD, GOOD BEER, AND LISTEN TO SOME GOOD TUNES!

item.title: The All New Wizard of Oz on Ice
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
From the moment the curtain rises on this dazzling ice show, audiences are transported to the whimsical world of Oz, where they'll encounter familiar characters like the Scarecrow, Tin Man, and Cowardly Lion, each brought to life with captivating choreography and dazzling costumes.

But the magic doesn't stop there – "Wizard of Oz On Ice" is an interactive experience like no other, inviting audience members to join in the adventure and become part of the spectacle themselves.

item.title: The WannaBeatles in Concert
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
When it comes to recreating the fun and excitement of the most popular band in music history, The WannaBeatles more than live up to their name. The WannaBeatles are Grammy finalists who have appeared on national television and use their multi-instrumental skills to re-create all eras of the Beatles’ songbook. The lads also put their own special stamp on other crowd-pleasing hits from the ‘60s and ‘70s.

The WannaBeatles are seasoned showmen who will entertain you with unique music medleys, comedy, and original material to create a joyful and different kind of Beatles experience.

item.title: The Drowsy Lads
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
A critically acclaimed Irish-American Folk powerhouse, The Drowsy Lads thundered onto the Irish music scene in the U.S. more than fifteen years ago and have become fan favorites. Sticking to traditional roots, the Lads bring a fire and excitement that quickly wins over audiences.

Ohio brothers John and Daniel McKewen, father and son Phil and Josh Franck, and lifelong friend Bryan Brookes bring to the stage a concoction of “we dare you to hold still” Irish dance tunes as well as a full emotional gamut of songs and good humor.

item.title: John Jorgenson Bluegrass Band
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
An all-star bluegrass supergroup featuring four legendary, award-winning musicians – John Jorgenson on acoustic guitar, mandolin and vocals; Herb Pedersen on banjo, acoustic guitar and vocals; Mark Fain on bass; and Patrick Sauber on acoustic guitar and vocals – this band delivers bluegrass like no one has ever heard it before.

The band’s thrilling live shows have received stellar reviews and have the bluegrass world buzzing. This is the “high lonesome sound” of American roots music at its finest.

item.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
The Holland Free Movie Series celebrates Valentine’s Day with this classic film!

A romantic departure from Truman Capote's novel of the same name, Breakfast at Tiffany's is a classic tale of falling in love. It also made Audrey Hepburn's Holly Golightly a style icon for generations of young girls. The legendary actress plays a fiercely independent young woman set on securing her financial future rather than following her heart. When she crosses paths with her new neighbor, a burgeoning young writer — who's also strapped for cash — the two fall for each other.

(NR | 1 hr 55 min)

item.title: Madcap Puppets: Pinocchio
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Join Geppetto’s beloved puppet on a thrilling quest to become a real boy. Pinocchio is lured into every prank and scheme imaginable as giant puppets and audience participation are woven into this cherished classic tale.

item.title: Close to You - The Music of the Carpenters
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Considered one of the best vocalists of all time, Karen Carpenter captured the attention of a generation with the surprisingly deep material of her unabashedly catchy pop music. Singer and playwright Lisa Rock has compiled a moving tribute to the music and life of Carpenter, and brings it to the stage with her 6-piece backing band.

Dedicated to recreating the true sound of the Carpenters, Rock and her band showcase some of the most memorable songs of the 70s including “We’ve Only Just Begun,” “Rainy Days and Mondays,” and of course “Close to You.”

item.title: Windmill Productions: Camelot
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Local actors present this classic musical version of the legend of King Arthur, his beloved Guenevere, and his Knights of the Round Table.

From "If Ever I Would Leave You" to the famous title song, the joyful and romantic music of Camelot has become a beloved part of the musical theater canon.

item.title: Galentine's Brunch
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a special Galentine's Brunch featuring massages, a charcuterie cart, mimosas, delicious one-eyed cookies, a featured project, and a poppin' balloon display for unlimited pictures!
$60 per person

item.title: Moth Stained Glass Workshop at Triple Moon
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Start the new year with a cozy, creative escape at Triple Moon! Join us for a Celestial Moth Stained Glass Workshop, where you’ll craft your own glowing masterpiece inspired by the enchanting beauty of moths under the moonlight.

This beginner-friendly workshop will guide you through the art of stained glass, teaching you a new skill in a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere. Perfect for adding a touch of magic to your January or as a thoughtful way to kick off your creative resolutions.

Spaces are limited, so don’t let this opportunity flutter by! Reserve your spot and let your creativity take wing.

Want to add candles to your craft day? Join us after your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you grab lunch or coffee and be ready to take home with you!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Sunday, January 12th, from 1:00-4:00PM. Our guest instructor for this event is Stacey from Windyknolls Stained Glass. All materials will be provided. Long pants and closed toed shoes are recommended.

Tickets:
- $65 per guest and you get to take home your finished project.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via Windyknolls Stained Glass.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins. Do not purchase tickets from anyone online other than through our secure checkout link.
- No children please, 16 and older (the irons too hot!)

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Pour & Play Thursdays: Throwback Edition
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
This week’s Pour & Play Thursdays is taking you back to the 90s! Grab your flannel, butterfly clips, or neon windbreaker, because we’re throwing it all the way back while we mix, pour, and vibe to the ultimate throwback jams.

Here’s the deal:
 Make your own candle – Choose your favorite fragrance, pour your soy wax, and create something totally custom.
 Throwback vibes – We’re blasting all the 90s hits, so get ready to sing along while you craft.
 Dress the part – Bust out your 90s best! Scrunchies, overalls, and chokers are highly encouraged.

Happy Hour Special:
 From 5-7 PM, enjoy 10% off your experience—because nothing beats a good deal with good tunes.
 Show your reservation or receipt at Flying Pepper after, and get 20% off your order (valid Thursdays only!).

As part of our Pour & Play Thursdays series, this event is all about good vibes, creativity, and a fun twist each week. This time, we’re bringing back the 90s energy for a night of nostalgic fun.

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Thursday evening, January 16th from 5-7PM. Get 10% off your candle bar experience during these hours.

The Venue:
Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave.
Bellefontaine, OH 43311.
Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Cousins Maine Lobster at Roundhouse
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Grab sme delicious Lobster

item.title: Pour & Play Thursdays: Burning Love Edition
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Love is in the air—and in the wax—at this week’s Pour & Play Thursdays! Bring your date, your bestie, or just yourself for a Valentine’s-inspired evening of candle-making magic. Whether you’re celebrating romance or self-love, this night is all about burning love and creativity.

Here’s what to expect:
 Create your custom candle – Mix your favorite fragrance and pour your soy wax to craft the perfect candle to light up your love life (or your Netflix night).
 Romantic vibes – Soft lighting, sweet tunes, and just enough cozy charm to melt your heart.
 The perfect date night – Whether you’re coupled up or coming solo, it’s all love here.

Happy Hour Special:
 From 5-7 PM, enjoy a BOGO: buy One get One 50% off your experience—because love should come with perks.
 Show your reservation or receipt at Flying Pepper after, and get 20% off your order (valid Thursdays only!).

As part of our Pour & Play Thursdays series, this week’s theme is a playful nod to Valentine’s Day. So come pour some love into your creation and leave with a candle as unique as your story.

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Thursday evening, January 23rd from 5-7PM. This is a Buy one, get one, 50% off experience! Perfect for date night candle making!

The Venue:
Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave.
Bellefontaine, OH 43311.
Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Family Paint Night: Squishmallow Edition
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a cozy January evening full of creativity, fun, and squishy vibes! Our Family Paint Night is all about painting your favorite Squishmallow-inspired designs while enjoying pizza and a family-friendly movie.

Whether you’re a budding artist or just looking for a fun activity with your family, this event is perfect for all ages. Relax in our warm, welcoming space and create memories that will last all year long.

Don’t miss this chance to kick off the new year with a cozy night of art, laughter, and delicious pizza! Spaces are limited, so grab your spot today!

Want to add candle making to your evening? Schedule your candle bar reservation separately on our website! 1 hour before class is ideal so that have time to cure before you leave, the bar will be open during class as well.

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Saturday, January 25th from 5:00PM to 8:00PM. We will be going through a guided painting of some different squishmallow designs! Pizza and Soda Provided!

Tickets:
- $20 per guest and you get to take home your finished projects.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via triplemoonproducts@gmail.com.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no walk-ins.

The Venue:
The **New** Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well! There is 1 step up to enter the building.

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Roundhouse Mug Club Celebration
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a celebration of our Mug Club Members. We will be serving a lunch.
Raise a toast to our loyal sippers

item.title: Keaton James Fout Live
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Keaton Fout is a 24 year old from Southern Hardin County, OH. Keaton plays a unique mixture of classic country music, blended with his own modern style. He loves to play the older songs from people such as: Hank Williams Jr., Charlie Daniels, and Merle Haggard. His modern influences include: Zach Bryan, Tyler Childers, and many more popular artists from the modern age. He also writes and records his own original songs that you can find anywhere you listen to music.

item.title: Name That Tune
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Test your Music Knowledge

item.title: Macrame Wall Hanging Workshop at Triple Moon
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Discover the art of macramé in our relaxing and fun beginner’s workshop, where you’ll learn to tie basic knots and combine them to create your very own beautiful wall hanging. This class is perfect for anyone who wants to unwind, get creative, and take home a skill they can enjoy for years to come.

If you’ve taken a plant hanger class before, this is the perfect next step to expand your skills and learn new techniques. This beginner’s course will help you build a strong foundation, preparing you for our intermediate workshops coming in 2025. Starting with this class ensures you’re ready to take your macramé to the next level.

Whether you’re brand-new to macramé or looking to grow your knot-tying skills, this workshop is a wonderful way to relax, connect with others, and craft something truly special. Join us and experience the magic of making with your own hands!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Saturday, January 11th from 4-7PM. Our in-house instructor for this event is Jess. All materials will be provided, age 12 and up is recommended.

Want to add candles to your craft day? Join us 30-60 minutes prior to your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you craft and be ready to take home with you after class!

Tickets:
- $45 per guest and you get to take home your finished project.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via Eventbrite or triplemoonproducts@gmail.com
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- Ages 12 and up are recommended

The Venue:
Triple Moon Creative Lounge
117 West Columbus Ave.
Bellefontaine, OH 43311.
Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: The Drowsy Lads
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Critically acclaimed Irish-American Folk powerhouse The Drowsy Lads kicks off the St. Patrick’s Day season!
The Drowsy Lads thundered onto the Irish music scene in the US over 15 years ago and their fire and comradery has won over both casual music-lovers and those steeped in hardcore Trad . 2018 brought the release of their 4th album, Everyone In, and the distinction of “Best Irish American Band of 2018”. With an undeniable genuineness that flows from their live performances, the future continues to look bright for these Lads.
Boasting 5 multi-instrumentalists, Ohio brothers John and Daniel McKewen, father and son Phil and Josh Franck, and lifelong friend Bryan Brookes bring to the stage a concoction of “we dare you to hold still” Irish dance tunes and songs that have packed festivals, theaters, pubs, and halls everywhere they’ve played.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Holland Theatre, 127 E Columbus Ave., Bellefontaine, OH 43311

item.title: Love At First Bite
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Tired of swiping? Let’s skip the apps and dive into real-life chemistry at Love at First Bite, The Morning Riot’s speed dating night! 

Whether you’re looking for love, a new connection, or just a great story to tell, this is your chance to meet fun, like-minded singles in 5-minute rounds. Plus, we’ve got snacks and drinks to keep the vibes lively and light!

 Your $35 Ticket Includes:
 Your first drink on us (cocktails, beer, THC drinks, specialty coffees/teas or soda)
 Light appetizers to fuel your mingling
 A personalized list of your matches, emailed after the event

GET YOUR TICKET NOW: https://www.eventbrite.com/.../speed-dating-love-at-first...

*For this first event, we are looking for 14 women and 14 men between the ages of 25 and 40, keep an eye out for future events for different demographics and special interests!

** This event is FREE FOR BRUNCH CLUB MEMBERS!!!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The Morning Riot, 130 S Main St

item.title: Pizza My Heart: Couples Paint Night
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Looking for a date night that’s as fun as it is unforgettable? Join us at Bella Vino Wine Room for Pizza My Heart, the perfect Valentine’s Date experience!

Spend an evening filled with:
 Delicious, freshly made pizza
 Bella Vino’s incredible selection of wines
 A guided Picasso-inspired Paint Your Partner session led by an instructor from Triple Moon Design Co.

Perfect for couples, besties, or anyone looking for a creative way to celebrate Valentine’s Day.
Because nothing says “I love you” like pizza, wine, and a nose painted on the wrong side of their face! 

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Wednesday, February 12th from 6PM to 9PM. We will be going through a guided, Picasso inspired, Paint Your Partner! Relax, eat pizza, have some laughs!

Tickets:
- $40 per guest and you get to take home your finished projects. Ticket is for 1 guest, you would need 2 tickets to bring your partner!
- Tickets include one glass of wine and all you can eat pizza buffet from 600 Pizza Downtown. Our bar will be open for additional drink purchases.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via triplemoonproducts@gmail.com.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no walk-ins.

The Venue:
Bella Vino Events & Wine Room
112 S Main St. Suite 2
Bellefontaine, OH 43311

Bella Vino entrance is behind 600 Downtown Pizza. There is a large, free, community parking lot directly behind Bella Vino and our community has a ton of other lots for parking with a short walk to Bella Vino.

Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Pour & Play Thursdays: Rom-Com Movie Night
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Pour & Play Thursdays: Rom-Com Movie Night! 

It’s time to laugh, cry, and create! Join us for a cozy Rom-Com Movie Night at Triple Moon, where you can pour your own custom candle and enjoy all the feel-good vibes.

Make your candle extra lovable with romantic vinyl decals to decorate your vessel—or keep it classic, your call! While your candle cures, snack on popcorn, BYOB, and get cozy with Valentine’s Day coloring sheets. Feel free to bring a blanket, snuggie, or your favorite comfy vibes and hang out with us as we enjoy some iconic rom-com movies playing in the background.

 Special Promo: Show your reservation or receipt for 20% off your Flying Pepper order, valid Thursdays only.

 When: Thursday, Feb 6th from 5-7PM
 Where: Triple Moon at 117 W Columbus Ave in downtown Bellefontaine
 Reserve your spot now for a night of candles, romance, and popcorn fun!

item.title: Game of Thrones Trivia
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Think you know GoT like the back of your hand? Prove it at Game of Thrones Trivia Night this February 6th at 6:00!  Gather your bannermen, claim your throne, and let the battle for trivia supremacy begin! Top 3 teams will win gift cards.

item.title: Downtown Bellefontaine Chocolate Walk
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
This year, treat yourself to the irresistible charm of the Downtown Bellefontaine Chocolate Walk! Gather your friends for a delightful evening of indulgence and exploration through our vibrant downtown.

The Chocolate Walk is back, featuring an array of local businesses ready to tempt your taste buds with an assortment of decadent, locally crafted sweet treats. With your ticket, you’ll enjoy a variety of chocolate delights, from rich candies to indulgent beverages.

Don’t miss out on exclusive offers and surprises at each stop – it’s a delicious adventure you won’t want to miss!

Check-in will be at Morning Riot located in the Main Street Marketplace!

item.title: Macrame Mug Rugs: Heart-shaped & Handmade
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Fall in love with macramé this Valentine’s Day! Join us for a creative and cozy workshop where you’ll make a set of four adorable heart-shaped mug rugs—perfect for your morning coffee, tea, or any drink you love.

These mug rugs are not just for Valentine’s Day—they’re so cute you’ll want to leave them out all year round! Whether you’re new to macramé or a knot-tying pro, this class is perfect for all skill levels.

 What’s Included: All materials and step-by-step guidance to craft your set of 4 heart-shaped mug rugs.

Celebrate the season of love with a handmade touch. Bring your favorite galentine, your Valentine, or treat yourself to a night of creativity and fun! Limited spots available—book now!

If you’ve taken a plant hanger class before, this is the perfect next step to expand your skills and learn new techniques. This beginner’s course will help you build a strong foundation, preparing you for our intermediate workshops coming in 2025. Starting with this class ensures you’re ready to take your macramé to the next level.

Whether you’re brand-new to macramé or looking to grow your knot-tying skills, this workshop is a wonderful way to relax, connect with others, and craft something truly special. Join us and experience the magic of making with your own hands!

The Details:

• Create and customize your own zipper pouch with pockets on the inside.

We’re excited to host this event at Triple Moon Creative Lounge, a space designed to foster creativity and community. Don’t miss this chance to learn a new skill and create something beautiful!

item.title: Nick Carter Live
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
I started trying to play a $15 guitar after watching Ricky Nelson and Roy Rogers. Terrible guitar.
Killed my fingers. But I kept at it. I joined the Jabberwockies in high school—Dan Charles and
Dave Wallace. We weren’t very good (well, Dave was always good) but we played a few sock
hops. We could play the same song (3 chords) for a long, long time…. G-L-O-R-I-A!!!!
Next came the Royal Society. That was Paul Finley’s name idea for the band—Dan, Dave, Paul,
and me. Lots of fun, lots of “after the game” hops at ILHS. Think Kinks and Stones, Monkeys.
Dan and I spent some time in Southern California after high school. Laguna Beach, San
Clemente area--coffee houses, dinner clubs playing Cat Stevens, John Denver, CSNY, folk
standards, and adding some original tunes.
SYMBIOSIS came next. Rick Robinson joined Dan and me. More originals than covers. SO much
fun singing and playing with those two. Besides being a “house band” at Skipper’s Galley at
Indian Lake, we found gigs in Columbus and around. Joined by Ron Johnson on drums, we were
the house band at Zero Earth in the OSU campus area for quite a while. We also opened for Sha
Na Na, Commander Cody, and Orleans over the years.
After many years of spending time in the islands (British Virgin mostly), I now split my years
between Logan County, Nashville, and Apalachicola. I recorded my CD, “Simple Life”, in 2018.
Joined by some amazing Nashville musicians and singers, and with the boundless talent of Tom
Manche in production, etc., it’s a collection of 12 original songs, many influenced by my time in
the Caribbean.

item.title: Nourish: A Night of Soup & Storytelling
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for an intimate evening of warmth, connection, and storytelling. Over steaming bowls of soup, fresh-baked bread, and candlelit conversation, we’ll come together as women to share our journeys, experiences, and wisdom.

This is more than just a dinner party—it’s a space to be heard, to listen, and to celebrate the power of authentic connection. Whether you have a story to share or simply want to soak in the atmosphere, you are welcome here.

Let’s slow down, savor the moment, and gather around the table to nourish both body and soul.

Seats are limited, so reserve your spot and join us for a night of meaningful conversation and community.

Downtown Bellefontaine, starting at Bella Vino

Thursday, April 17th, from 5 PM - 8 PM

Anyone 21+ looking for a fun and unique night out! A festive adult Easter egg hunt where participants visit downtown businesses to collect eggs filled with treats, prizes, exclusive deals, and raffle tickets for big prizes.

Your ticket includes:

Eggs at each participating business

A spring-themed mixology class to create your own mocktail or cocktail (choose your session at 5:30 PM or 7:30 PM)

item.title: Heartache Tonight: A Tribute to the Eagles
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Kick off your Fourth of July week with this tribute to the Eagles in all their eras and incarnations!

Every show is filled with moments designed to thrill classic rock fans, from the soaring a cappella harmonies of “Seven Bridges Road” to the snarling guitars of “Life In The Fast Lane" and the anthemic country rock of “Take It Easy." With meticulous attention to every detail, these six talented musicians reproduce live all the memorable hits of this enormously popular rock powerhouse, plus individual members' solo hits.

item.title: Friday Night Live Music Series
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Friday Night Live Series 

Join us for Friday Night Live, a free outdoor music series in Downtown Bellefontaine! Enjoy live performances from talented local musicians while sipping, strolling, and soaking in the summer vibes.

 Location: By the Courthouse in Downtown Bellefontaine
 Time: 5:30 PM – 7:30 PM
 Dates & Lineup:

May 16 – Pete Moss (featuring Loft & Hidden Spaces Tour)
June 13 – Just Darcy
June 27 – J Rossty
July 11 – Sebastian Furrow
July 25 – Band of Ravens
August 1 – John Whitehead (featuring Taste of Bellefontaine)
August 15 – Tucker Munz

Kick off your weekend with live music in the heart of downtown!

Enjoy free live music from talented local artists 
Wander through downtown and discover unique shops & eateries
Sip on a drink from a participating DORA location. 
Soak up the summer vibes in a laid-back, welcoming atmosphere.
No tickets, no fuss—just great music and a great time!

item.title: Stained Glass Workshop: Mother's Day Weekend
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate the beauty of spring with a stained glass workshop where you’ll create your own vibrant flower bouquet design! This hands-on experience will guide you through the art of cutting, assembling, and soldering colorful glass pieces to craft a stunning floral masterpiece.

As the seasons shift, this workshop is a perfect way to welcome new beginnings, embrace creativity, and enjoy time with others in a relaxed, inspiring atmosphere. Whether you’re drawn to the delicate details of petals and leaves or simply love the idea of capturing nature in glass, you’ll leave with a one-of-a-kind piece that brightens any space. No experience needed—just come ready to create and connect!

Want to add candles to your craft day? Join us before or after your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you grab lunch or coffee and be ready to take home with you!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Saturday, May 10th from 11:00am-2:00PM. Our guest instructor for this event is Stacey from Windyknolls Stained Glass. All materials will be provided. Long pants and closed toed shoes are recommended.

Tickets:
- Bundle options for pricing. 1 flower for $25, 2 flowers for $50, or flower bouquets (2 flowers and greenery) $65. Prices are per guest, this means you cannot buy a 2 or 3 flower bundle and split it with another person.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via Windyknolls Stained Glass.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- No children please, 16 and older (the irons too hot!)

The Venue:
Triple Moon
117 West Columbus Ave.
Bellefontaine, OH 43311.
Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Triple Moon Designs, 117 W Columbus Ave

item.title: Mother's Day Candle Bar Weeken
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Mother’s Day Candle Bar Weekend
Saturday, May 10 & Sunday, May 11
Buy One, Get One Half Off – for Mom

This Mother’s Day weekend, we’re celebrating the women who pour their hearts into everything they do. Whether you’re a mom, have a mom, or love like a mom—this weekend is all about them.

Moms give so much of themselves every day and rarely take the time to recharge. So let’s change that. Treat her (or yourself) to a cozy, creative experience at our Candle Bar. Come solo for some well-deserved “me time,” or bring your favorite people and make sweet, scented memories together.

Here’s the deal:
Buy one candle, get the second half off—because that second one has to be for Mom.
Each candle-making session takes about 30 minutes to an hour, and prices range from $22–$38 depending on the vessel you choose. Candles take about 2 to 3 hours to cure, which is the perfect amount of time to take your mom out to eat or browse some of our shops in downtown Bellefontaine.

And on Sunday, we’ve got an extra treat: a Mocktail Pop-Up with tons of girly, gorgeous drinks to sip while you pour. Think pink, sparkly, and delicious—no alcohol, all vibes.

Reservations are highly recommended for this weekend—it fills up fast, and we want to make sure you get your spot at the table. There is a reservation link attached to this event page, you can also visit our website. There is no fee to make a reservation.

Come light a candle and celebrate the ones who light up our lives.

item.title: Holland Theatre Marquee Celebration and Lighting
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
The new Holland Marquee will be lit up for the first time at this gala downtown celebration!

Bring the whole family and join us starting at 6:30 p.m. for food trucks, free live music, DORA drinks, on-site T-shirt screen-printing, photos and more. Marquee lights go on at sundown!

item.title: Pelvic Floor Seminar with Angie McAuley, PT
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Pelvic floor health isn’t just for the gym—it’s for life.
Join us, Saturday, May 17th at 9:15am as we learn more about how to start prioritizing your pelvic health.

Fun fact...everyone has a pelvic floor! This event is FREE and open to all.

Did you know your pelvic floor supports bladder and bowel control, core strength, and even sexual function? As our bodies age, these muscles evolve, and knowing what to focus on at each stage can make all the difference. Consulting with a PFPT can help you create a tailored plan to stay supported and strong well into your golden years.

Angela McAuley, MPT, has been an active physical therapist since 2002 and joined the Mary Rutan Therapy and Sports Medicine team in 2020. She earned her Bachelor of Science degree in Biology with a minor in athletic training from Morehead State University in 1999 and her Master of Physical Therapy degree from Andrews University in 2002. Angela has experience in outpatient, sports medicine, aquatic, and acute settings. Throughout the years she has enjoyed working with individuals in various age groups, ultimately working towards a goal for improved function.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: LoCo Depot Training Station, 210 W Columbus Ave

item.content:encoded:
Get ready for the event of the year: Pineapple Palooza, Street Fair!
Proudly Sponsored by Four Acre Clothings family of companies!

This signature event is centered around our beloved downtown fountain, topped with a pineapple, symbolizing hospitality, welcome and a real good time. This year, Pineapple Palooza is bigger and better than ever:

- Dance to beats from our live DJ.

- Enjoy a variety of food trucks.

With attractions and activities galore, this is your perfect chance to dive into all things fun and pineapple. Stay tuned for more details, and don't forget to grab a friend for a fantastic time at Pineapple Palooza!

item.title: 2025 All You Can Eat Crawfish Boil
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
2025 Crawfish Boil feat. Hoof Hearted Brewing

We are excited to partner with Hoof Hearted Brewing for our 2025 Crawfish Boil on Wednesday, June 11th from 6-10 PM!

Hoof Hearted Brewing has been turning tanks like cassette tapes since late 2011. Known throughout the industry for their deft hop-wrangling and nude air guitar prowess, they do everything they can to provide fresh, high-quality (and sometimes hi-test) liquid to help you get the party poppin'.

2025 Hoof draft lineup coming soon!!

ALL YOU CAN EAT BUFFET MENU
-Crawfish (Delivered live the day of the event)
-Andouille Sausage
-Shrimp
-Corn on the Cob
-Onion and Red Potatoes
-Collard Greens w/ Pancetta
-Jalapeño Cheddar Corn Bread w/ Old Bay Compound Butter.

All tickets are general admission and include the menu above, a special gift from Hoof Hearted, live music from an amazing lineup of local musicians and your first beer. Not to mention access to a private party in the Syndicate beer garden!

Doors open at 6:00pm, dinner served around 7:00pm/

Four Acre Clothing will be on-site, live printing event tee shirts from their mobile print truck.

This event is 21+

Reserve your spot here: https://resy.com/cities/bellefontaine-oh/venues/the-syndicate/events/2025-crawfish-boil-featuring-hoof-hearted-brewing-2025-06-11

item.title: Dine to Donate: Jailyn Leeper
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
•PLEASE JOIN US, WEDNESDAY MAY 14TH•
DINE TO DONATE: JAILYN LEEPER
•10% of ALL sales go to the Leeper family
•DINE-IN OR CARRY-OUT•

Jailyn Leeper, 19 yrs old is a 2024 honors graduate of Riverside HS and in her Freshman year at Ohio Northern University studying Forensic Science. Jailyn had been experiencing pain in her legs and severe bruising in addition to headaches. Her mother, Tina, took her to MRH ER on Friday, April 18th. After a significant amount of bloodwork, this young lady & her families world was turned upside down. Jailyn was diagnosed with Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia. Jailyn was transferred and admitted to Nationwide Children’s Hospital, Columbus. Monday, April 21st, Jailyn endured a spinal tap, bone marrow biopsy and the implant of her chemo port. Chemotherapy began Tuesday. Jailyn will be subjected to chemotherapy for the next two weeks. Going forward, Jailyn’s treatment plan will include two years of chemotherapy as well as bone marrow and spinal taps twice monthly. Please help us to ease this families financial burden, and lift them in love and prayers.

Main Street Signs & Graphics are selling Tee shirts, Jailyn Strong with proceeds going to the Leeper family. jailynstrong.itemorder.com

item.title: The Murph Chellenge
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us on Memorial Day, May 26th for The Murph Challenge, at LoCo Depot CrossFit in Bellefontaine. The first heat kicks off at 7:00 am, with subsequent heats on the hour until the last heat takes off at noon, accommodating all schedules.

Whether you're a seasoned athlete or just starting your fitness journey, modifications are welcomed for everyone to participate. The Murph Challenge is not just a physical test, but also a mental and emotional one. Participants are pushed to their limits and are encouraged to keep pushing through the pain and exhaustion, just as Lieutenant Murphy did during his final moments. The event is held annually on Memorial Day, and people from all over the world come together to honor Lieutenant Murphy and all those who have given their lives in service to our country. The Murph Challenge is a powerful reminder of the sacrifices made by our military and a testament to the strength and resilience of the human spirit.

Let's come together to sweat, support, and salute our heroes. See you there!

If you are interested in preparing for this event we will be offering Murph Prep Mondays every Monday, beginning 4/21 at 5am, 6:15am, 9am and 5:30pm. If interested in purchasing a class pass click the link!

5 Class pass:
https://go.streamfit.com/embed/memberships/700/11336

10 Class pass:
https://go.streamfit.com/embed/memberships/700/11337

item.title: Bookish Stained Glass Workshops
item.dc:creator: admin_sn

Calling all book lovers, cozy crafters, and creative spirits! 

Join us this July for the most adorable stained glass workshop yet — we’ll be creating a sweet little stack of books topped with a dainty teacup, perfect for your bookshelf, reading nook, or sunny windowsill. This whimsical design is a love letter to quiet moments with a good book and a warm cup of tea. 

Spots are limited, so grab your ticket and invite your favorite reading buddy or craft-loving friend. Let’s make something beautiful together! 

Want to add candles to your craft day? Join us before or after your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you grab lunch or coffee and be ready to take home with you!

item.title: Dine to Donate: Hope Kids
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us on Wednesday, July 23rd at Brewfontaine, where we are teaming up with Relentless Powerlifting to raise money for Hope Kids.

HopeKids provides ongoing events, activities, and a powerful, unique support community for families who have a child with cancer or some other life-threatening medical condition. We surround these remarkable children and their families with the message that hope is a powerful medicine.

Local strong man and loyal Brewfontaine Mug Club member, Damon D-Bone Dixon will be hand delivering our donation check at their 2025 Powerlifting meet in Shakopee, Minnesota, where he and the Relentless team will be raising additional funds for Hope Kids.

10% of sales for the day are valid on Dine-in, carryout, platters and box lunches. If ordering platters or box lunches, please contact Rachelle at : 937-935-4110 or rachelle@syndicatedowntown.com at lease 48 hours in advance.

item.title: Return to Her: A Feminine Awakening Through Meditative Painting
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Return to Her

This is a space for your whole self.
No apologizing. No masking. No shrinking.
You don’t have to explain your softness.
You don’t have to fix your emotions.
You don’t have to “be okay.”
You are accepted here — fully, fiercely, and without condition.

Return to Her is a soft, sacred ritual for reconnecting with the truest parts of yourself. Through guided journaling, intuitive painting, and gentle nervous system work, we’ll explore what it means to soften without fear and to remember who you were before the world told you to be tough all the time.

 This experience is for women who are:
• Feeling overextended, hardened, or burnt out
• Craving slowness, softness, or quiet strength
• Ready to release control and reconnect to the feminine
• Longing to feel safe in their own body, energy, and intuition again
 You’ll be guided through:
• A series of gentle journaling prompts
• A meditative painting process to unravel internal “knots”
• Visualization of new neural and emotional pathways
• The creation of an intuitive canvas that reflects your healing

 You’ll also receive:
• A large canvas (20x24) to take home
• A softcover journal for continued reflection
• A hand-poured candle to anchor in the ritual
• Tea, soft lighting, and a safe space to land

You do not need to be an artist.
You do not need to be at peace before you arrive.
You are not here to be fixed. You are here to remember.

 We encourage you to come comfortable. Wear your clean, comfy clothes, whatever that is to you. Wear soft, wear feminine, whatever makes you feel safe even if that’s your oldest sweatshirt. We encourage you to bring clean blankets & yoga mats if you have them or want to. (It’s not necessary). You will be able to take off your shoes and paint standing, sitting in a chair or kneeling/sitting on floor. Turn your phones on DND. If you want to bring a drink and a snack you can. You are also welcome to bring any supplies you want to add as well, we will provide paint, some markers, brushes and tools but if you have a small connection to something bring it. You’re also welcome to bring any alter items or anything you need to get into the space.

 Come exactly as you are. Leave softer, fuller, and more connected to the feminine truth that’s been waiting underneath it all.

Tickets:
- $65 per person
- This event is sacred and because of the limited availability, we will not be offering any refunds. If you must cancel, please let us know in advance so we can fill your seat.
- No refunds for no shows.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- 18 and older (You will be asked to leave if you bring anyone under 18 and it will make us all uncomfortable. Please Don’t).
- No Pets (You will be asked to leave if you bring anyone under pet and it will make us all uncomfortable. Please Don’t).

The Venue:
Triple Moon
117 West Columbus Ave.
Bellefontaine, OH 43311.
Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Samuel Harness Live in the Back Yard
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
ALL AGES SHOW! NO COVER!

Samuel Harness is an American singer-songwriter known for his raw, soul-drenched vocals and emotionally charged lyrics. Since making his official debut in 2017, Samuel has carved out a unique space in the music world, blending heartfelt storytelling with a powerful sound that resonates deeply with listeners.

With over 20 million streams worldwide, standout tracks like “HELP” and “Not the One” have connected with audiences across the globe, showcasing his ability to turn personal experiences into universally relatable anthems.

Samuel gained national attention as a standout contestant on NBC’s The Voice (Season 21) and later appeared on American Idol (Season 21), captivating millions with his unforgettable performances. Following his television success, he launched his own headlining tour across the U.S., building a loyal fanbase through electric live shows and authentic connection.

Driven by the belief that “music is medicine,” Samuel continues to release music that heals, inspires, and empowers.

Stay connected and follow Samuel’s journey: • Instagram: @Samuel_Harness • Facebook: Samuel Harness Music • TikTok: @SamuelHarness1 • Twitter/X: @Samuel_Harness • YouTube: Samuel Harness

Make your reservation here, no cover! https://resy.com/.../samuel-harness-live-in-the-back-yard..

item.title: Glazed & Confused | Adult Paint Your Own Pottery Night
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Come get a little glazed, a little confused, and a lot inspired at this very chill, very adult-only paint night. We’re serving:

 Pottery pieces to glaze however your beautifully weird brain desires
 A lovingly curated spread of munchies (yes, real ones)
 Mocktails + soda that are 100% legal and 100% vibey
 A full permission slip to zone out and make something cool

Wanna add a little extra glaze to your evening?
We’ve partnered with Craft Emporium to offer $1 off THC singles and DORA draft beers — perfect for pre- or post-painting.
Just show your ticket to snag the deal. 

You bring the imagination. We’ll bring the snacks, the supplies, and the vibes that are definitely not influenced by anything specific. .

No substances sold or provided — just a cosmic glaze experience and the occasional uncontrollable giggle. Come make art and questionable color choices with us.

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Friday, August 8th, from 6-8pm. This is a pottery glazing workshop, you’ll pick your ceramic piece and chill in our studio to glaze it.

You will leave the pieces of pottery with us to fire in the kiln after you leave. Pottery will be available for pick up starting the following week, Thursday, August 14 through Sunday, August 17th. Please google if you need our hours for pick up!

Want to add candles to your craft day? Our candle bar will be open during this event! Mix & match your favorite scents and pour your own custom candle. Candles start at $22 and take 2-3 hours to cure before they can be taken home.

Tickets:
- $45 per guest and you get to take home your finished project.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via triplemoonproducts@gmail.com
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- Ticket amount cannot be transferred to another class or purchase if you can’t make it.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- Ages 21 and up ONLY

The Venue:
Triple Moon
117 West Columbus Ave.
Bellefontaine, OH 43311.
Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

 FAQs

Q: Is this a 420 event?
Hmm Nope. But if you think the name is funny… you’re invited.

Q: What’s included?
One paint-your-own pottery piece (up to $35), all glaze materials, access to the mocktail & a seriously snacky spread.

Q: Can I upgrade to a bigger pottery piece?
Yes! You can pay the difference at the event if you fall in love with a chunkier ceramic.

Q: Can I show up under the influence?
We’ll leave that between you and the universe. Just don’t harsh the vibe.

Q: Will this sell out?
Yes. You already waited too long to buy the ticket, didn’t you?

item.title: Entrepreneur Boot Camp
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Fuel Your Business Growth

Join the Chamber along with Huntington National Bank and the Dayton Minority Business Assistance Center (MBAC) for an empowering and informative session designed to help you fund and grow your small business.

This event is especially ideal for businesses that are:

 Woman-Owned
 Minority-Owned
 Veteran-Owned

What to Expect:
Huntington National Bank will share insights on financing options available to small businesses, with a special focus on their Lift Local Business program — a unique initiative that provides:

 Low-cost loans specifically for women-, minority-, and veteran-owned businesses
 Business planning support to help you reach your goals
 Free financial education courses
 Hands-on guidance to support your long-term success

Plus, learn how the Dayton MBAC can support your growth!
Ohio's Minority Business Assistance Centers (MBACs) help small, minority-owned, women-owned, veteran-friendly, and disadvantaged businesses succeed with:

 Technical and professional assistance
 Access to capital and surety bonding
 Connections to real business opportunities across Ohio

Their team will walk you through how to work with the Dayton MBAC office and tap into resources designed to help you thrive.

 Event Details:
 Thursday, August 28
 The Syndicate | 213 S. Main St., Bellefontaine
 8:30-11am
REGISTER HERE: https://members.logancountyohio.com/.../entrepreneur-boot...

Don’t miss this opportunity to connect with local experts, discover powerful tools, and take the next big step for your business.

Let’s grow together!

item.title: Cowgirl Cookie Club | Cookie Decoration Workshop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Saddle up for the sweetest summer event around! Join us for Cowgirl Cookie Club — a hands-on royal icing cookie decorating class where you’ll learn how to decorate like a professional cookie baker.

We’re bringing all the Pink Pony Club meets Cowgirl Summer vibes as we walk you through four themed cookie designs. Think boots, hats, ponies, and all things pretty in pink with a western twist!

Perfect for beginners or anyone looking to up their cookie game, this class will cover icing techniques, piping tips, and decorating strategies — all while having a rootin’-tootin’ good time.

Want to add candles to your craft day? Join us 30-60 minutes prior to your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you do your project and be ready to take home with you after class! Grab your bestie, throw on your cutest cowgirl fit, and come kick it with us in the sweetest club this side of the wild west!

 Spots are limited, so giddy-up and grab yours now!

All supplies included. No experience necessary. More Details Below!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Saturday, August 23rd from 12-2PM. Our guest instructor is professional baker, Emily, from Rosie Cheeks bakery. She will be walking us through how to decorate our Cowgirl cookie set with royal icing.

- Ages 7+ recommended
