item.title: Modern Calligraphy for Beginners
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join Sip & ScriptⓇ for Modern Calligraphy Fun!

Join us at Triple Moon Design Co in Bellefontaine, Ohio, for pretty lettering! Whether you’re a stationery nerd, DIY Bride-to-be, or just a crafty individual, you’ll be introduced to modern calligraphy with a pointed dip pen and ink in this workshop. We will cover all the basics and prepare you to add those unique lettered details to your snail mail, wedding paper goods, home decor, and more! The perfect crafty morning out!

Class includes 1.5 hours of instruction and demonstration, our beginner’s calligraphy kit (two nibs, black ink pot, 2 letter guides, tracing paper, and straight pen holder), and all materials to write on. Everything is yours to keep at the end of the workshop!

Check out their Facebook page and say hey on Instagram to learn more about Triple Moon Design Co.!

Get your tickets below!

Feel free to come early, grab your seat and explore the studio. PLEASE NOTE: Light refreshments will be served, and you’re welcome to bring any snacks or drinks with you! Class will start promptly at 11:00 am!

Class Expectations: Yes, lefties are welcome too! This class is encouraged for someone who has never taken a calligraphy class before. We teach the basics, and our expectation for you is to have ink flowing through your nib with enough confidence to be able to practice way beyond class. We love using tracing paper with our guides to help you build muscle memory and develop your own style! If you have tried calligraphy out before, this class will be a great refresher and hopefully a chance to try some new supplies from our beginner kit that will re-introduce you to this lovely form of art!

A note on bringing guests 16 and under: We love to share this passion with kids. You are welcome to get a ticket for your child, and ask that a ticketed adult accompany anyone under the age of 16 at all times.

Location: Downtown Bellefontaine

item.title: Sourdough Workshop November 2025
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Kick off November with a hands-on sourdough experience that will have you baking like a pro just in time for Thanksgiving and holiday gatherings! 

At this interactive workshop, you’ll learn the entire process of sourdough bread-making—from mixing the dough to shaping, baking, and even adding your own creative ingredients. While you bake, enjoy delicious appetizers and sip on cocktails (available for purchase).

By the end of class, you’ll go home with:
 Your own sourdough starter
 A proven recipe to keep baking
 A freshly baked loaf of artisan bread
 A prepped loaf ready to bake at home
 A stencil sheet to personalize your creations

And that’s not all—one lucky attendee will win a complete sourdough baking kit (Dutch oven, banneton, and lame) to keep the magic going in their own kitchen.

 Where: Centre City Mall Shopping Center
 When: 11/6 at 6PM
 Tickets: Includes appetizers, instruction, and materials. Drinks sold separately.

 Spots are EXTREMELY LIMITED—reserve yours today and wow your friends and family with rustic, homemade sourdough at your holiday table!

item.title: Spooky Stained Glass Workshop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
In this enchanting session, you’ll learn the art of stained glass from start to finish, guided by expert instructors. Whether you’re a seasoned crafter or a complete beginner, this hands-on workshop will leave you with a boo-tiful piece of art perfect for Halloween or year-round charm. Get ready for a ghostly good time, some creative fun, and a take-home masterpiece that’s hauntingly unique!

Want to add candles to your craft day? Join us 30-60 minutes prior to your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you learn stained glass and be ready to take home with you after class!

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Saturday, October 18th from 11-2. Our guest instructor for this event is Stacey from Windyknolls Stained Glass. All materials will be provided. Long pants and closed toed shoes are recommended.

Tickets:
- $65 per guest and you get to take home your finished project.
- No refunds for no shows. In the event you must cancel your reservation, if it’s 72-hour notice, you may request a refund via Windyknolls Stained Glass.
- If someone in your party does not come, you may not take home their materials.
- No-shows and cancellations made the same day as class will not be refunded.
- You must be registered for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.
- No children please, 18 and older (the irons too hot!)

The Venue:
Triple Moon Creative
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311. Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Boos & Brews
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Ghost Paint & Sip is coming to the coziest shop evaaa! 

We’re thrifting old paintings + giving them a spooky new life  You’ll get a one-of-a-kind canvas, all the paints, brushes & glitter you need, plus 1 drink + snackies to fuel your haunted masterpiece. 

Limited spots (like, ghost-vanishing fast ) → grab your ticket before they disappear!

item.title: Garage Sports Trivia

item.title: BRUNCH-O! Round Two
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for Round #2 of BRUNCH-O!

It’s time to shake up your weekend with The Morning Riot’s Bingo Brunch! We're serving up epic eats, boozy (and non-boozy) drinks, and serious Bingo fun that’ll have you yelling “BINGOOO!” louder than your Aunt Cheryl at the family reunion.

What’s Included?

A killer brunch spread chock full of house-baked bagels, pastries and more!
Your first drink (Mimosas, Bloody Marys, THC/CBD, Epic Coffee or any of our canned beers/ciders/seltzers).
10 cards for 10 rounds of Bingo with prizes you don't want to miss!
 Feeling Thirsty?Upgrade to bottomless mimosas and Bloody Marys for just $20—because the only thing better than brunch is brunch with unlimited booze.

 Event Details:

Date: Saturday, 10/11/25
Doors Open: 1:00 PM
Game Time: 2:00 PM
Location: The Morning Riot
 Tickets: $50 per person (includes brunch, one drink, and 10 Bingo cards).

Warning: This event was a massive hit and tickets will go fast. Get yours now!

item.title: Witches' Night In | Candle Making & Painting
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Step into the warmth of candlelight and the chill of the season with Witches’ Night In — a cozy, spooky evening designed for those who love fall, Halloween, and creative fun.

 Taper Candle Painting – decorate your own spooky or whimsical tapers with acrylic and glow details.
 Fall Candle Pouring – create a luxurious fall-scented candle to take home (up to $35+ value!).
 Movie Magic – cozy up to a Halloween-inspired film while your candles set.
 Seasonal Snacks & Drinks – cider, tea, and a touch of sweetness to enjoy throughout the night.
 Photo Moments – flickering candlelight is perfect for sharing memories.

 Relax in the soft glow and enjoy the intimate, creative vibe of the evening.

Tickets: $50 per person – includes all materials, candle, snacks, and the full Witches’ Night In experience.

The Details:
Mark your calendars for Thursday, October 9th, from 6-9pm.

The Tickets:
- $50 per guest and you get to take home your finished fall candle you poured and set of 4 taper candles that you painted. Ticket covers candles up to $35, if you find a larger one you prefer, you may pay the difference.
- Ages 13+ recommended (there may be alcohol present because we are in DORA and witches like to party sometimes).
- Due to the nature of this event refunds will only be permitted up to 7 days before the event. After midnight, October 1, all sales are final and refunds will not be permitted.
- You must be registered ahead of time for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.

The Venue:
Triple Moon
117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311.
Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:
Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

 The Syndicate

item.title: Mystery at the Museum - Murder Mystery Date Night
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
A Murder Mystery Date Night.

Tired of the same old dinner and a movie?

​​Experience a thrilling blend of intrigue, suspense, and romance at 'Mystery at the Museum'! A 1920's themed murder mystery date night.

​Step into a world where priceless artifacts and deadly secrets collide. You and your date will become characters intwined in a thrilling murder mystery where you will discover clues, learn and talk with other characters, and solve the mystery all right within the hallowed halls of the museum.

What to expect:
An immersive storyline: Follow clues, interrogate suspects (the other couples), and piece together the puzzle to unmask the killer.

A unique date experience: Spark engaging conversations and create unforgettable memories as you work together to solve the crime.

A touch of elegance: Enjoy the sophisticated ambiance of the museum setting.

Delicious refreshments: Indulge in light bites and beverages throughout the evening.

Only 25 tickets available!

October 4th | 7pm - 10pm
Logan County History Center
(521 E Columbus Ave, Bellefontaine, OH 43311)

Tickets: $79 per couple​
- 2 tickets to participate in the Mystery at the Museum Date Night.
- 2 even t-shirts (one for you and your spouse).
- Hors d'oeuvres and drinks provided.​​

Don't just watch a mystery, solve one together!

item.title: Witch, Please! A Hocus Pocus Craft Social
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
It’s time to stir the cauldron, light the black flame candle, and let your spooky side shine. Join us for an enchanted evening where we’ll be making a Hocus Pocus–inspired wall hanging (the perfect touch for your haunted lair).

While you craft, sip on spooky-themed cocktails, nibble on bewitching bites, and enjoy a night full of laughs, magic, and mischief. Think potions, pumpkins, and plenty of hocus pocus energy.

Whether you’re a Sanderson Sister at heart, a spell-slinging crafter, or just here for the boos (and booze), this night will leave you cackling with delight.

 When: October 4th, 2025 Where: The Morning Riot Tickets include: Craft supplies, guided project, appetizers and a whole lot of spooky fun. (Drinks sold separately)

Grab your ghoul gang and let’s get witchy!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The Morning Riot, 130 S Main St

Stop in during the Downtown Pumpkin walk and try Ichabod Train, an exclusive collaboration with Brewfontaine and Roundhouse Depot Brewing Co!
This Pumpkin Pie cream ale is loaded with pumpkin and spices, perfect for the season. Both locations will start pouring at noon. Be sure to grab a DORA cup of Ichabod Train and walk the town to check out the festivities!!

item.title: Name That Tune @ Brewfontaine
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Name That Tune at Brewfontaine with Sinners Like Us DJs!
Get a couple people or a whole crew together, and come hang out on the patio! We play your team a song from a variety or categories, and you tell us what it is. So easy, so fun! Prizes provided by Brewfontaine!

item.title: Ohio State VS Michigan Tailgate Party
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Kegs, Eggs & Kickoff – OSU vs. Xichigan Game Day Bash! 🏈 Friday, November 29th | Doors Open @ 8:00am $10 Entry | Kids Get in Free! Remember that bar back in the day? The one decked out in scarlet & gray, potlucks lining every table, the game blaring, and an ice-cold beer in hand before the sun came up? We're bringing it back. Join us for a throwback-style Game Day Bash that captures the heart of the rivalry – community, energy, and tradition. - Kegs & Eggs to start your day - Bloody Mary's & Mimosas - Appearance from THE O-State Mascot! - All-you-can-eat breakfast (while it lasts) - Ice-cold beer on tap early - Game on big screens with full sound - Kid-friendly and family-welcoming - Vibes straight from the good ol’ days $10 per adult | Kids get in FREE Tickets are LIMITED! Scarlet, gray, and plenty of pride — we’ll see you there.

item.title: Mini Candle Flights at Make Time
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Mini Candle Flight Experience 

Cozy candle making, autumn colors, and a perfectly curated evening at Make Time Studio in downtown Bellefontaine!

Join us on Saturday, November 8 from 4–6 PM for a relaxing afternoon creating your very own mini candle flight of four, 2.5 oz candles, in rich fall hues of burgundy, tan, forest green, and burnt orange.

Our candle bar team will guide you through the process of scent mixing and selection so you can design a unique, balanced collection of cozy seasonal scents.

 $35 per person
 Make Time Studio | Downtown Bellefontaine
 We’re part of the DORA District, so you’re welcome to bring in your favorite drink while you create!

Take a break, settle into the glow, and make time for a cozy candle experience you’ll love (and your home will smell amazing after).

item.title: Holiday Candle & Ornament Painting Night
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Friday, November 14 | 6–9 PM
 Make Time – Downtown Bellefontaine

 Tickets

$45 per maker

Includes one candle pour (up to a $33 value which is any of our single & double wick options)
Includes a set of 3 holiday bulb ornaments to paint and take home (Yes, there will be some stencils this time!)
All materials and instruction provided
 About the Experience

Join us for a cozy, creative evening surrounded by candlelight, low lights, and the glow of a classic Holiday movie. You’ll pour your own custom candle and paint a set of three festive ornaments — perfect to hang on your tree or gift to someone special this holiday season.

This relaxed night is all about slowing down, laughing with friends, and making something beautiful in our warm, moody studio atmosphere.

 Bring Your Own DORA Drink

We’re located in Bellefontaine’s DORA District, so guests 21+ are welcome to bring in drinks from local favorites while they pour and paint.

 Quick Details

Beginner-friendly, all supplies provided
Candles can take up to 2-3 to cure, if they are not set by the time you're done with ornaments you may need to pick up another day that we are open.
Adults and teens welcome
3-hour cozy, guided experience
Limited seating — tickets required
Make time for a night of candlelight, creativity, and cozy holiday vibes.

item.title: Gratitude Candles | Thankful Thursday at Make Time
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Thursday, November 20 | 5–8 PM
 Make Time – Downtown Bellefontaine

 Tickets

$33 per maker (plus tax)

Includes one custom-poured candle (any single or double wick, up to $33 value)
Choose from so many premium & seasonal scents
Option to upgrade to a larger candle at the event by paying the difference
 About the Experience

Join us for a cozy, reflective night of candle pouring and gratitude at Make Time. You’ll blend and pour your own custom-scented candle using our 100% soy wax — clean, sustainable, and free from parabens, phthalates, and Prop 65 warnings.

As you pour, you’ll be invited to write a short gratitude note or intention to place under your candle — something meaningful to you or a message for someone you plan to gift it to.

This experience is perfect for anyone wanting to create a thoughtful hostess gift for Thanksgiving or a personal reminder of thankfulness to light through the season.

 Bring Your Own DORA Drink

We’re located in Bellefontaine’s DORA District, so guests 21+ are welcome to bring in drinks from local favorites while you pour.

 Quick Details

Come anytime between 5–8 PM
Candles take 2–3 hours to cure and will be ready for pickup the next day
Beginner-friendly and guided by our candle bar team
All materials provided
Refund Policy: Cancellations require 7 days’ notice for a refund or credit

 Make Time – Downtown Bellefontaine

Our candle bar team will guide you through scent blending using our clean, 100% soy wax, free from parabens, phthalates, and Prop 65 warnings. Each session is small and relaxed, with just six guests per time slot, so you’ll have plenty of space to enjoy the process and soak up the cozy, holiday vibes.

 Bring Your Own DORA Drink

item.title: Friendship Paint & Sip | Thanksgiving Cookie Pop-Up
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Sunday, November 23 | 2–4 PM
 Make Time – Downtown Bellefontaine

 Event Details

Join us for a cozy Friendsgiving afternoon at Make Time! We’ll be painting a fall leaf design on a wood canvas while watching Friends (yes — including the Thanksgiving episode with Joey’s turkey ).

It’s the same weekend as the Downtown Bellefontaine Holiday Open House, so the shops will be decked out and full of festive fun — make a whole day of it downtown!

To make things even sweeter, Rosie Cheeks Bakery will be popping up in the studio with her Thanksgiving treats, perfect for your holiday table or a little indulgence while you paint. 

 Tickets

- $35 per maker
- Includes all painting supplies
- Includes a cute fall coffee & tea bar to sip while you create
- Step-by-step painting instruction and cozy candlelight atmosphere

Candle Add-On (+$25)
- Add a $25 candle credit to your ticket and pour your own candle before or during the event
- This offer covers any of our single-wick candles (up to $33 value)
- It’s the best deal on candles — save while you create a coordinating fall scent for your space or as a gift! Discount deal will not be available for candles purchased that day at the bar, this deal is only for pre-sale tickets bought here.
 About the Experience

Relax, laugh, and get creative with friends during this cozy Sunday paint & sip. You’ll leave with a finished wood-canvas painting and all the warm fall feelings — plus, if you choose the candle add-on, your custom candle will be ready to take home by the end of class.

 Bring Your Own DORA Drink

We’re part of the DORA District, so guests 21+ can bring in drinks from local favorites while they paint.

item.title: Christmas Cookie Decorating at Make Time
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Christmas Cookie Decorating Workshop with Rosie Cheeks Bakery

Saturday, December 6 | 11 AM – 1 PM
 Make Time – Downtown Bellefontaine

 Tickets

- $45 per maker
- Includes instruction and all materials to decorate four holiday cookies
- Learn to work with royal icing like a professional
- Designs include a cozy Christmas house, tree, stocking, and mug of cocoa
- Guided by Rosie Cheeks Bakery

 About the Experience
Join us for a cozy morning of cookie decorating and holiday cheer! 
Rosie Cheeks Bakery will walk you step-by-step through decorating four festive cookies using royal icing techniques. You’ll learn how to outline, flood, and detail your cookies just like a pro — while sipping, chatting, and getting in the holiday spirit.

This laid-back Saturday workshop is the perfect way to slow down, enjoy the season, and create something sweet — whether you’re bringing a friend, family member, or treating yourself to a little festive fun.

All supplies are included, and no prior decorating experience is needed!

 Add Candle Making After Class!

Want to keep the creativity going after cookie decorating? Stay a little longer and pour your own custom candle!

Add a $25 Candle Credit to your ticket and enjoy a guided candle-pouring experience after the cookie class ends. This credit covers any of our single- or double-wick candles (up to $33 value) — a perfect companion to your cozy cookie creations or an easy gift for someone special.

Candle pours take about 30–45 minutes, and your candle will be ready to take home the same day.
(This discount offer is only available as a pre-purchased add-on ticket. You will still be able to make candles after class but the discount only applies if you pre-purchase here.)

 Bring Your Own DORA Drink

We’re part of the DORA District, so guests 21+ can bring in drinks from local favorites while they decorate.

item.title: ThunderBeard: America's #1 Tribute to ZZ Top
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
See America's #1 ZZ Top Tribute, LIVE Saturday, November 22nd at the Holland Theatre!

The ultimate ZZ Top tribute band, ThunderBeard authentically recreates the live experience of “That Little Ol' Band from Texas." With real beards, fuzzy guitars, and showmanship like the original, this tribute will transport you back to the heyday of rock and roll.

ThunderBeard will have you singing along to classic hits such as “Sharp Dressed Man," “La Grange,” “Gimme All Your Lovin’,” and many other iconic songs from the legendary band's 50-plus year history!

Tickets start at $15. This event is generously sponsored by Ravenhurst Champagne Cellars.

item.title: It's a Wonderful Life: A Live Radio Play (Windmill Productions)
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
"It's a Wonderful Life: A Live Radio Play" reimagines the beloved holiday movie as a live 1940s radio broadcast. Actors portray multiple roles and create sound effects, bringing to life the story of idealistic George Bailey as he considers ending his life one fateful Christmas Eve.

This heartwarming production captures the spirit of the original film while offering a fresh, engaging theatrical experience for all.

Tickets are $20 adults/$5 youth 17 and under.

item.title: The Drowsy Lads: An Irish Christmas
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
This crowd-pleasing Irish-American band returns to the Holland for another rousing evening – this time with a lively assortment of Christmas music mixed with the band’s trademark traditional Irish tunes.

Ohio brothers John and Daniel McKewen, father and son Phil and Josh Franck, and lifelong friend Bryan Brookes have been making music together for 15-plus years. Their holiday events are full of the joy of the season without losing any of their “I dare you to sit still” energy and passion!

Generously sponsored by Marker Inc. Tickets start at $15.

item.title: West Central Ohio Community Concert Band Christmas Concert
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Come enjoy the sounds of the season at this FREE concert!

Directed by Mr. Joe Antram, the all-volunteer band includes amateur and professional musicians, educators, and students hailing from multiple Ohio counties.

Admission is free, but a ticket is required to make sure everyone has a seat at this popular annual concert.

item.title: Justin Alan Live
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Enjoy a seasonal brew, bite to eat, and good tunes! Justin Alan plays rock, alternative, folk, country, etc - wrapped in a laid back and crowd-focused show. One of our crowd favorites!

item.title: Burn Before the Bird
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Join us this Thanksgiving morning and burn some calories before you dig into some grub for the day! This event is open to the community and free! Bring a pal and come join in the fun.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: LoCo Depot Training Station, 210 W Columbus Ave

item.title: Paint Your Own Pottery | Family Day at Make Time
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Fall Family Pottery Painting Day 

Join us at Make Time Bellefontaine on Sunday, November 9th from 12–5 PM for a cozy, come-and-go pottery painting experience!

This family-friendly event is the perfect way to spend a fall afternoon together. Choose your favorite ceramic pieces (valued up to $25) — pumpkins, mugs, décor, and more — and paint them with your own creative touch. Each ticket also includes your $5 glaze and fire fee for just $30 per maker. You are welcome to choose a larger pieces (valued about $25) and just pay the difference on-site.

 A family-friendly fall movie will play throughout the day to keep the vibes cozy and relaxed.
 Glazing typically takes 1–2 hours, depending on your piece. Once fired, your finished pottery will be ready for pickup the following week — just in time for Thanksgiving tablescapes or handmade holiday gifts for your hosts!

 We’re part of the DORA District, so parents can bring in drinks from local favorites.
 We also welcome carry-in snacks or food from downtown spots — make it a full day out!

Come anytime between 12–5 PM and stay as long as you’d like. Let’s make time for creativity, cozy family memories, and a little fall fun. 

 Make sure you purchase a ticket here to ensure you and your family have a seat to glaze!

item.title: Lima Symphony Orchestra: Vivaldi's Four Seasons
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Violinist Geneva Lewis takes center stage in a program of vivid musical storytelling.

The evening opens with Nokuthula Ngwenyama’s Primal Message, a composition that reflects humanity’s attempt to communicate with extraterrestrial life. Next, Vivaldi’s Four Seasons – among the classical canon’s most beloved and well-known violin concertos – brings to life the brilliance of the ever-changing rhythms of nature. Together, they build a musical journey, concluding with Mozart’s 40th Symphony, a passion-filled piece of unparalleled beauty.

Generously sponsored by Katterhenry Investment Group of Nest Capital and Richard Brundage. Tickets start at $25.

item.title: The Yuletide 5
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
The Yuletide 5 return to the Holland!

Jazz up your holidays with this festive Christmas show featuring some of central Ohio’s most talented jazz musicians. This sensational jazz combo brings a unique and festive twist to holiday classics, infusing them with the soulful sounds of the season.

Generously sponsored by Beasley Architecture & Design. Tickets start at $15 adults/$5 youth 17 and under.

item.title: Coffee, Cocoa & Carols for a Cause
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
In 2025, the Native Coffee family raised over $2,000 in monetary donations and provided hundred of dollars in materials to The Peak of Hope Homeless Shelter!

On December 5th, following the Hometown Christmas Parade, join us for musical performances  by John Whitehead and friends!

Your support means a helpful hand up to a Logan County unhoused family or individual in need!

Follow us on Facebook to find out more about the Peak of Hope Shelter!

item.title: Bellefontaine Community Dish Part Two
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for an afternoon of learning, connection, and community in the hospitality industry! We’ll start with an insightful panel discussion featuring leaders from the restaurant and hospitality community, who will share their expertise, experiences, and strategies for success in today’s ever-changing industry. Panelists include: Former restaurateur and consultant Marco Piazza, Brewfontaine and The Syndicate owner Adam Rammel and State Representative Tim Barhorst.

Following the panel, you’ll have the opportunity to ask questions and dive deeper into the topics that matter most to you during an open Q&A session. Whether you’re a restaurant owner, operator, or industry partner, this is a chance to learn, network, and celebrate the strength of our industry together.

10% of sales for the day are valid on Dine-in, carryout, platters and box lunches. If ordering platters or box lunches, orders will need to be placed at least 48 hours in advance. https://www.brewfontaine.com/catering.html

The Logan County Art League is a community organization based in Bellefontaine, OH, dedicated to promoting and supporting local artists and art enthusiasts.

Offering a variety of art-related events, workshops, and exhibitions, the Art League provides a platform for creative expression and collaboration within the community.

item.title: Thanksgiving Night: Late-Night Brews & Stranger Things Menu Drop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
This Thanksgiving night, when the world goes quiet and the real night owls crawl out… we’ll have the lights on for you. 

Whether you’re fueling up for your Black Friday chaos, needing a cozy place to decompress after family time, or just wanting a little company + comfort on a holiday that can feel a bit heavy — your Allways Brewin’ fam will be here with open arms (and open tabs).

 Stranger Things Volume II Menu Launch @ 7pm
To celebrate the new season drop, we’re unleashing a whole new lineup of drinks straight from the Upside Down.
Think cozy, eerie, nostalgic, a lil’ chaotic — all the Hawkins vibes you love. 

 Open late for all your post-turkey adventures
Headed out for those midnight Black Friday deals?
Running on pure vibes and leftover stuffing?
Need caffeine strong enough to fight a Demogorgon?
We got you, cutie.

Come hang with us, bring the fam, bring your besties, or just bring your beautiful self.
We’ll be slingin’ magic, comfort, and strange things all night. 

See you Thanksgiving night, babes.
Let’s get strange.

item.title: Dine to Donate at Craft x Journey Nature School
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Drinking is caring! Join us on 11/20 for a Drink To Donate for Journey Nature School. $1 off ANY drink at The Craft Emporium - take out is not included. Some exclusions apply.

This November, Logan County HeadStart operations are set to temporarily close due to the government shutdown and we need your help in providing these families with part-time support until their resources return.

Journey Nature School (JNS) is working with area organizations (like the Logan County Farmers Market & Vendors), volunteers, and donors to provide supplemental preschool offerings to the families whose children are in the 3-5 year old pre-k rooms at Head Start.

Without the federal and state funds to keep the program going, these families will be left with little to no options for their children through the month of December (at least), regardless of if the government opens back up within the next couple of weeks.

With your contributions, JNS will be offering 2 days a week of a bridged program, that blends the JNS program elements with familiar spaces and routines of their typical HeadStart classrooms.
Help us help local children today, by ensuring that families are offered support through these challenging times.

This campaign and program are efforts of Journey Nature School and The Craft Emporium to support families who utilize Head Start offerings.

Logan County’s Head Start programs are not requesting funds for their operations.

Let’s make the season merry, meaningful, and full of good cheer

item.title: Downtown Bellefontaine Chocolate Walk
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Indulge in Downtown Bellefontaine's Chocolate Walk on Feb 13! Enjoy sweet treats and a delightful evening stroll.

The Chocolate Walk is back, featuring an array of local businesses ready to tempt your taste buds with an assortment of decadent, locally crafted sweet treats. With your ticket, you’ll enjoy a variety of chocolate delights, from rich candies to indulgent beverages. Gather your friends for a delightful evening of indulgence and exploration through our vibrant downtown.

Check-in will be at downtown's newest event venue, The Maxwell! Enjoy a chocolate martini before you get on your path of yummy sweetness!

item.title: The Ultimate Doors: Tribute to the Doors
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Authentic and powerful, this popular Doors tribute delivers a raw, electrifying, and immersive experience that captures the spirit of Jim Morrison and The Doors with uncanny accuracy.

From period-correct instruments and vintage gear that re-create The Doors’ unmistakable tones, to the styling, stage presence, and energy that mirror the original, every detail transports audiences back to 1968. It’s not just a tribute: it’s a time machine!

item.title: Bedazzle and Bookish night
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Get ready for the coziest craft night of the season at Allways Brewin’! Join us for our Bring-Your-Own-Book Bedazzle Night, where you bring a book or journal you love…and we supply all the sparkle. 

Each ticket includes:
• 1 handcrafted drink of your choice
• Snacks + sweet treats to nibble on
• Full access to all bedazzling supplies - gems, stickers, charms, sparkle sheets, ribbons, tools & more
• A warm, cozy creative space filled with magical book café vibes

This night is all about slowing down, decorating something you love, and hanging out with other bookish babes in a space that feels soft, whimsical, and so Allways Brewin’.

Whether you’re giving your current read a glow-up, customizing a journal, or just looking for a cozy night out - this event is the perfect mix of creativity, comfort, and community.

Seats are limited, so reserve your spot and come craft with us!

item.title: Disney: The Little Mermaid Jr
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Local middle schoolers bring this beloved Disney classic to life!

With hits like “Under the Sea” and “Part of Your World,” The Little Mermaid tells the story of a young mermaid princess named Ariel who dreams of living on land and falls in love with human Prince Eric. She makes a dangerous deal with the sea witch Ursula. Ariel's friends, including the fish Flounder and the crab Sebastian, help her navigate the human world to win Eric's love.

This junior musical version is about one hour long.

Tickets: $15 adults/$5 kids

item.title: Galentine's Love Bites: Candle Making & Cookies
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a special Galentine’s Love Bites during the Downtown Bellefontaine Chocolate Walk — the perfect way to turn a fun night out into a full experience.

Here’s how the night works:

 Start by making your candle at our candle bar

 Let it set while you enjoy the Chocolate Walk downtown

 Pop around to collect treats, stroll, and hang out

 Come back to pick up your finished candle before the night ends or any other time we are open!

What’s included with any candle-making experience:

 A mini cookie to sweeten the night

 A complimentary Love Spell wax melt — our featured Valentine scent

 All the cozy, creative Galentine energy

This night is all about doing something fun together — make your candle, enjoy the walk, and end the evening with something you created.

Spots are limited — grab yours and make it a night 

The Details:

Mark your calendars for Friday, February 13th, from 4pm-8pm. Remember your candles take 2-3 hours to cure. So you can make them early and pick up before close, or leave them with us and pick up another day that we are open. We hold candles for 1 month.

The Tickets:

Your tickets are $35 Per Guest and include candle making at our candle bar, a FREE mini cookie from One Eyed Cookie Lab, and one FREE wax melt featuring our February Scent, “Love Spell.”

The Venue:

Make Time - Bellefontaine

117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311.

Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:

Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Tucker Munz Live

item.content:encoded:

GRAB SOME GOOD FOOD, GOOD BEER, AND LISTEN TO SOME GOOD TUNES!

item.title: The One with the Valentines Cookies: Cookie Decorating Workshop
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Join us for a Friends-inspired Valentine’s cookie decorating workshop led by professional baker Emily of Rosie Cheeks Bakery!

In this hands-on class, you’ll learn the basics of royal icing cookie decorating while creating an adorable themed set inspired by everyone’s favorite comfort show. Emily will guide you step-by-step through piping, flooding, and adding those finishing details—no experience required.

Whether you’re celebrating Galentine’s Day, a cozy date night, or just looking for a fun creative outing, this class is all about good vibes, sweet treats, and spending time with friends.

What’s included:

Pre-baked sugar cookies
All royal icing, tools, and supplies
Guided instruction from a professional baker
A boxed set of cookies to take home and enjoy
Come solo, bring your bestie, or grab a group—this is the one you don’t want to miss 

Want $5 off candle making? Join us 30-60 minutes before/after your class time and craft a custom soy candle at our Candle Bar! Your candle will cure while you enjoy downtown and be ready to take home with you within 2-3 hours.

The Details:

Mark your calendars for Sunday, February 8th, from 1pm-3pm. Our guest instructor is professional baker, Emily, from Rosie Cheeks bakery. She will be walking us through how to decorate our Friends Inspired cookie set with royal icing.

The Tickets:

- $45 per guest and you get to take home your finished cookie set.

- Ages 7+ recommended

- Due to the nature of this event all sales are final and refunds will not be permitted.

- You must be registered ahead of time for the event to take the workshop; no same day registrations or walk-ins.

The Venue:

Make Time - Bellefontaine

117 West Columbus Ave. Bellefontaine, OH 43311.

Free parking is available on West Columbus, there is a huge parking lot in the back of the building with free parking as well!

The City:

Downtown Bellefontaine is a beautiful place to spend the day! If you are coming in from out of town please plan extra time to visit all the best places! Tons of coffee, shopping, antiques, bakeries, and FOOD! We are also in D.O.R.A., so grab a drink and walk around! Feel free to email or dm for any local recommendations!

item.title: Stained Glass Love Letters
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
We’re making the CUTEST little stained glass love letters — a sweet glass envelope with a mini “note” poking out that YOU can customize anytime with a marker.
Write a message… erase it… write a new one…
Love notes, affirmations, spicy secrets, song lyrics — whatever your heart’s into.

This workshop is hands-on, cozy, and ridiculously adorable. A perfect Valentine vibe whether you're rolling solo, bringing your person, or making it a Galentine's moment.

When, Where & Cost

 Make Time Bellefontaine: 117 W Columbus Ave, Bellefontaine, OH 43311
 Saturday, February 7th
 12:00 PM – 3:00 PM
 Price: $65

Who’s Teaching

This class is taught by Stacey from Windy Knolls Stained Glass — a stained glass queen with the patience of an angel and the creativity of someone who’s definitely been to an art supply store more than once today. No experience needed. She’ll walk you through every step.

Ages

This workshop is for ages 17+.

Safety Stuff (Important!)

We’re working with glass tools + hot irons, so:

Closed-toe shoes required
Long pants recommended
Please be mindful of hot tools + materials
What’s Included

Pre-cut stained glass pieces
All tools + materials
Step-by-step guidance from Stacey
A customizable glass “love letter” 
Complimentary coffee + tea
Cozy Valentine vibes all day
DORA Friendly

Our Bellefontaine studio is in the DORA district — feel free to bring a DORA drink while you create!

Why You’ll Love It

It’s creative, cozy, nostalgic, and so much fun. You leave with a stained glass keepsake you can personalize again and again — a little love note for your home, your partner, or your future self.

item.title: Booked, Bloomed, & Beloved: Valentines Edition
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
A Cozy Galentine’s Afternoon

Join us for a gentle Galentine’s afternoon made for friends, books, and quiet moments that feel like a hug.

Booked, Bloomed & Beloved is a ticketed, soft-hearted celebration of friendship and favorite stories. Think warm lattes, flowers in your hands, pages turning quietly, and the kind of calm you only find in a cozy bookstore.

Your ticket includes:

Come with friends or come solo — curl up, sip slowly, read quietly, and leave feeling full in all the best ways.

item.title: Valentine's Date Night: Candles & Cake
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Friday, February 14
 Arrival times available: 5:00, 6:00, 7:00 & 8:00 PM
 Make Time Studio – Bellefontaine
 $50 per couple

Celebrate Valentine’s Day with a cozy, creative date night made for connection, conversation, and a little indulgence.

Couples will enjoy creating one custom 3-wick candle together, followed by sharing a heart-shaped cake made especially for this event by our downtown bakery partner, City Sweets Creamery. We’ll set the mood with soft music, candlelight, and optional couples games designed to spark connection without pressure.

This experience is intentionally limited to keep the atmosphere intimate and relaxed — perfect for a meaningful Valentine’s night without the noise of a crowded restaurant.

 What’s Included:

 One 3-wick candle-making experience per couple
 One heart-shaped cake per couple (Eat-in or To-Go)
 Welcome champagne toast
 Optional couples conversation & connection games
 A cozy, romantic studio atmosphere
 Downtown DORA Friendly:

Make Time Studio is located within Bellefontaine’s DORA (Designated Outdoor Refreshment Area). Couples are welcome to grab a drink from a participating downtown location and bring it along to enjoy during the event, in addition to the welcome toast provided.

 Good to Know:

Capacity is limited to 5 couples per time slot
Candle Bar will be closed to walk-ins during this ticketed event
This is an in-person experience (no items shipped)
Candles will be ready for pickup after curing
Make time for each other this Valentine’s Day — we’ll handle the rest.

item.title: The Princess Bride (Free Movie Series)
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate “twue wuv” AND the Holland’s 95th birthday with this beloved film that tells the story of farmhand Westley's quest to rescue his true love, Buttercup, from an unwanted marriage to the villainous Prince Humperdinck. A parody of fairytales blending romance, adventure, and humor, The Princess Bride features iconic characters like the vengeful swordsman Inigo Montoya, the giant Fezzik, and the mastermind Count Rugen.

(1 hr 38 min | PG)

This event is free, but a ticket is required!

item.title: Name That Tune
item.dc:creator: admin_sn
item.content:encoded: Name That Tune: It's a fun night of music trivia. Grab your friends and enjoy a pint!
